* A project manager w
data.jd_text:
**Job Description Summary**
 The Project Manager will be responsible for planning and executing a portfolio of controls projects, leading cross\-functional teams towards successful project delivery and high customer satisfaction.
   

  

**Job Description**
**What you’ll do;**
* A project manager will assume the following responsibilities:
* Acting as primary customer contact throughout the project lifecycle with highly effective communication, handling project requirements, managing contracts, resolving specification issues; providing periodic updates; coordinating with Sales staff, negotiating scope changes (price and delivery), arranging customer\-witnessed tests and coordinating field service activities with appropriate Service Manager.
* Managing multi\-projects portfolio (\> 10 projects simultaneously) through various stages of project lifecycle; from purchase order receipt up to commissioning and project close out.
* Managing and reporting all financial aspects of project including budgets, costs, margin, invoicing, and receivable collection.
* Developing and maintaining project schedule through collaboration across all functions, monitoring major control points and ensuring timely completion of critical project milestones.
* Leveraging all existing and future Project Management tools, processes and QMS procedures to execute projects in most effective fashion and deliver with high quality standards.
* Facilitating project review meetings, project risk reviews and management plans, pre\-mortem discussions and project close\-out meetings.
* Providing daily engagement, leadership and direction to other functions within the project team to ensure an alignment on project goals and priorities to deliver a project success.
* Implementing continuous improvement for processes impacting the organization by developing and suggesting enhancements while maintaining productivity and efficiency.
* Accountable for project progress updates to key stakeholders including timely identification and communication of project risks and opportunities to management teams.
* Influencing decision making and problem solving in cross\-functional organization while driving inclusive culture and win\-win solutions.


**What you’ll bring;**
* Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology.
* Minimum 2 years of Technical expertise and professional background about energy sector and control technologies
* Minimum 3 years of experience leading or coordinating projects in a matrix organization, with demonstrated ability to manage cross\-functional stakeholders
* Proven experience in a customer facing role with business/commercial skills
* Organizational, analytical, and problem\-solving abilities
* Demonstrate ability to manage \~5\-10 projects simultaneously
* Managing and reporting project financials KPIs
* Managerial computer skills and tools for reporting, presenting and conducting data analysis
* 30% travel required across the globe, including security level 1 \& 2 countries.
* Flexibility to work efficiently with regional customers and global functional teams with different time zones
* Strong communication skills in English


**What will make you stand out;**
* Minimum 5 years of experience in control systems and/or turbine field.
* Minimum 3 years of experience in Project Management.
* Minimum 2 years expertise in ERP systems (SAP is advantage).
* Multi\-lingual capabilities (Arabic \& French are advantage).
* Excellent oral and written communication skills.
* Uncompromising Integrity and passion for winning.


******Additional Information******
**Relocation Assistance Provided:** 
 No

data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description**
 Do you want to shape the world of tomorrow and work on innovative projects? Then you're a good fit for us! We are a global engineering group with 15,000 employees and 140 locations worldwide. With our services, we are driving the topics of energy efficiency, climate protecti
data.jd_text:
**Company Description**
 Do you want to shape the world of tomorrow and work on innovative projects? Then you're a good fit for us! We are a global engineering group with 15,000 employees and 140 locations worldwide. With our services, we are driving the topics of energy efficiency, climate protection and decarbonization and developing tech industries into new dimensions.
   

  

 The world of SEGULA Technologies Experts revolves around industries such as automotive, software, energy and life sciences. As an independent player, we support OEMs and suppliers with personal engineering services. Take advantage of new opportunities and take on exciting tasks and attractive positions with direct customer assignment.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Location:** 
 Dubai, UAE
   

  

**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-time
   

  

**Department:** 
 Finance / Project Finance / Corporate Development
   

  

**Seniority Level:** 
 Director
   

  

 We are looking for an experienced
 **Project Finance Director** 
 to lead the financial structuring, modelling, valuation, and transaction support of major development projects across the Near and Middle East region.
   

  

**Important:** 
 This is a
 **Project Finance Director** 
 role focused on
 **development project financing, M\&A transactions, financial structuring, valuation, investment committee preparation, and bankability analysis** 
 . It is
 **not** 
 a CFO, Head of Finance, or operational finance management position.
   

  

 The selected candidate will act as a key financial advisor to Business Development and Investment teams and will support projects from origination and tender stage through financial close, acquisition, development, and handover to operational teams.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Financial Modelling \& Valuation
   

  

 Develop comprehensive financial models for new development projects, acquisitions, greenfield and brownfield opportunities, and M\&A transactions.
   

  

 Perform detailed valuation analysis and assess project returns in line with applicable accounting and investment standards.
   

  

 Challenge cost assumptions, revenue forecasts, financing assumptions, and business plans for tender submissions and investment decisions.
   

  

 Support impairment testing, long\-term planning exercises, and financial analysis for growth projects.
   

  

 Risk Analysis \& Financial Structuring
   

  

 Identify, analyze, and quantify key project risks, including construction, operational, credit, currency, interest rate, contractual, and financing risks.
   

  

 Review contracts from a financial perspective and prepare risk matrices to support project decision\-making.
   

  

 Support bond requirements, guarantees, insurance considerations, and other financial risk mitigation mechanisms.
   

  

 Structure project financing solutions in coordination with banks, financial institutions, external advisors, and internal stakeholders.
   

  

 Transaction Support \& M\&A
   

  

 Lead financial workstreams for M\&A transactions, including due diligence, valuation, transaction modelling, financial planning, closing support, and integration.
   

  

 Review and optimize financial and legal structures, including tax, debt, equity, and project company considerations.
   

  

 Support the preparation and optimization of financial offers during prequalification, tender, and negotiation stages.
   

  

 Coordinate financial, technical, legal, and tax due diligence activities to ensure bankability and investment readiness.
   

  

 Documentation \& Governance
   

  

 Review and contribute to finance\-related provisions in contractual documentation, including share purchase agreements, shareholders’ agreements, service agreements, and financing documents.
   

  

 Prepare investment memorandums, financial presentations, and decision\-support materials for senior management and investment committees.
   

  

 Ensure projects comply with internal investment criteria, governance standards, and approval processes.
   

  

 Support smooth transition from development phase to project CFO or operational finance teams after award or financial close.
   

  

 Stakeholder Management
   

  

 Work closely with Business Development, Legal, Tax, Accounting, Treasury, Investment Control, M\&A, Corporate Development, Insurance, and regional management teams.
   

  

 Liaise with external advisors, auditors, banks, financial institutions, and other transaction stakeholders.
   

  

 Participate in financial negotiations with partners, lenders, investors, and clients.
   

  

 Translate complex financial concepts into clear recommendations for non\-finance stakeholders.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, Economics, or a related field.
   

  

 MBA, CFA, ACCA, CPA, or equivalent professional qualification is preferred.
   

  

 Minimum
 **10 years of progressive experience** 
 in corporate finance, project finance, infrastructure finance, M\&A, investment banking, transaction services, or financial advisory.
   

  

 Strong experience in financial modelling, valuation, project finance structuring, and investment analysis.
   

  

 Solid understanding of IFRS and the application of accounting standards to complex transactions.
   

  

 Experience with bankable project finance structures, debt financing arrangements, and non\-recourse or limited\-recourse financing.
   

  

 Strong knowledge of corporate tax structures, business contracts, shareholder arrangements, and financing documentation.
   

  

 Ability to coordinate financial, legal, technical, tax, and commercial due diligence workstreams.
   

  

 Experience in infrastructure, utilities, water, energy, environmental services, PPP, or concession\-based projects is highly desirable.
   

  

 Familiarity with Near and Middle East markets is preferred.
   

  

 Fluency in English is required. Arabic and/or French would be an advantage.
   

  

**Required Skills \& Competencies**
 Advanced financial modelling and valuation skills.
   

  

 Strong analytical, strategic, and problem\-solving mindset.
   

  

 Excellent understanding of project finance, M\&A, risk analysis, and investment governance.
   

  

 Strong negotiation and stakeholder management skills.
   

  

 Ability to defend financial assumptions and investment recommendations with confidence.
   

  

 Excellent communication and presentation skills.
   

  

 High level of financial rigor, attention to detail, and accuracy.
   

  

 Ability to manage multiple complex projects under tight deadlines.
   

  

 Proactive, autonomous, resilient, and comfortable working in fast\-paced environments.
   

  

 Strong cultural sensitivity and ability to work across functions, countries, and seniority levels.
   

  

**Preferred Background**
 Candidates coming from the following backgrounds will be strongly considered:
   

  

 Investment Banking
   

  

 Project Finance Advisory
   

  

 Infrastructure Finance
   

  

 Transaction Services / Deal Advisory
   

  

 Corporate Development
   

  

 M\&A
   

  

 PPP / Concession Projects
   

  

 Utilities / Water / Energy / Environmental Infrastructure
   

  

 Multinational Corporate Finance teams focused on development projects
   

  

**Additional Information**
**Important Note for Applicants**
 This position is specifically focused on
 **project finance, financial structuring, M\&A transactions, valuation, bankability, and development project financing** 
 .
   

  

 Candidates with only traditional accounting, financial control, FP\&A, or operational CFO experience may not be suitable unless they have strong hands\-on exposure to project finance and transaction structuring.
   

  

**Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted**

data.raw_snippet: **We are a dedicated Squad on a mission to reshape watchmaking, rooted in our legacy since 1884\. With a passion for crafting timepieces that thrive across air, land, and sea, we bring together a unique fusion of casual elegance, sustainability, and inclusive luxury. With 140 years of heritage and o
data.jd_text:
**We are a dedicated Squad on a mission to reshape watchmaking, rooted in our legacy since 1884\. With a passion for crafting timepieces that thrive across air, land, and sea, we bring together a unique fusion of casual elegance, sustainability, and inclusive luxury. With 140 years of heritage and over 1,900 passionate individuals across 20 countries, we’re excited to continue our journey forward.** 




**Join our vibrant team in Dubai as a Visual Merchandising Executive and be part of something extraordinary!** 




  





 Your main mission will be to drive excellence across every stage of the VM process—from planning and logistics to clear guidance and flawless execution. This is a pivotal role within the business, requiring a highly organised, self\-motivated individual who thrives on bringing structure, creativity, and consistency to in\-store presentation.
 



  





  





**Your contribution:** 





 Planning \& Logistics
 




 • You coordinate all Visual Merchandising activities, managing communication with Global, ordering POS and campaign materials, and ensuring smooth logistics, timely delivery, and flawless implementation.
 



 • You manage the GWP program end\-to\-end, including ordering, distribution, and in\-store/event usage, while monitoring stock levels, optimising utilisation, and recommending process improvements.
 



 • You collaborate closely with the Global team on Capex projects (store openings and refurbishments), overseeing design, approvals, agency standards, budgets, and execution.
 



 • You manage the VM budget in partnership with the Marketing Director.
 



  





  






 Implementation \& Coaching
 




 • You regularly visit all locations to review standards, provide coaching, and deliver product training.
 



 • You coordinate and implement campaigns with retailers and boutiques, ensuring alignment with brand strategy and achievement of KPIs.
 



 • You communicate launch plans and VM updates clearly to boutiques, ensuring alignment with Global guidelines and consistent reporting and feedback.
 



 • You ensure all locally produced materials meet brand standards, liaising with Global teams for approvals where required.
 



 • You collaborate with retail teams to develop boutique activities and events that support commercial priorities.
 



 • You support PR and Events teams in designing and executing fixtures, pop\-ups, and special activations.
 



  





  






 Execution \& Decoration
 




 • You partner with VM contacts in each boutique, providing commercial and visual guidance while sharing best practices.
 



 • You work closely with Retail teams to ensure boutique decoration is refined, locally relevant, and aligned with global VM standards.
 



 Do you think there is even more to discover in this role? You're right — apply today and learn more!
 



  





  





**You will perfectly fit into our Squad if:** 




 • You have at least 3 years’ experience in a similar role within a luxury environment in the GCC.
 



 • You demonstrate excellent organisational and planning skills.
 



 • You communicate effectively, with the ability to motivate and guide store teams to execute to brand standards.
 



 • You bring strong knowledge of the region and cultural awareness.
 



 • You are willing and able to travel across the region.
 



 • You have a confident, dynamic personality and a strong interest in market trends and innovations.
 



 • You are fluent in English; Arabic is an advantage.
 



 We invite you to apply even if you do not meet all of these criteria.
 



  





  





**Our values:** 




  





**At Breitling we are...EPIC! :** 



* Entrepreneurship – We take ownership, act with agility, and dare to challenge the status quo.
* Performance – We strive for excellence and deliver with impact, precision, and passion.
* Innovation – We embrace creativity and continuously push boundaries to shape the future.
* Care – We look after our people, our clients, and our planet, with respect and responsibility.



  





**Want to take on this mission and join our team? Apply now!**

Join the UAE’s largest bank and one of the world’s largest and safest financial institutions. Our focus is to create value for our employees, customers, shareholders and communities to grow through differentiation, agility and innovation. We are looking for top talent and your success is our success. Accelerate your growth as you help us reach our goals and advance your career. Be ready to make your mark a top company, in an exciting \& dynamic industry.
 



**Job Purpose** 




 To grow and manage large account portfolios and sensitive client relationships for assigned portfolio in the Industrials \& Manufacturing segment; improve service quality levels and supervise the subordinates' day\-to\-day activities and client interactions to ensure that the team's objectives are constantly met and its revenue targets achieved, while maintaining client satisfaction and portfolio credit quality.
 



  





**Key Accountabilities** 




  





**Client and Market Analysis** 



* Conduct financial analysis on clients and their respective geographies/ industries/ markets to identify potential opportunities and risks.



  





**Business Origination** 



* Originate new business opportunities with target clients across relevant banking products in full compliance with applicable internal policies and the Target Market and Risk Acceptance Criteria.
* Obtain support from relevant stakeholders and governance forums to close deals (e.g., credit, products, GT).
* Negotiate and develop Term Sheet, mandate letter pitch deck etc. for new transactions in close co\-ordination with product teams. Ability work on financial models, and conduct evaluations to support deal structuring and client presentations. Strong understanding of LMA documentation protocols would be a plus.
* Examine \& resolve credit, market and operational risk aspects of the transactions in collaboration with products and enablement units.
* Collaborate and work closely with FAB International Branches to increase client wallet share, depth of relationship and X\-sell opportunities with key global client relationships.
* Expand Products Penetration Through Sector\-Focused Solutions
* RORAC \[Return on Risk Adjusted Capital] calculation, drafting and submission of CAC note to Capital Allocation Committee in order to meet mandated return thresholds.
* Maintain the credit quality of the client's relationships within the Portfolio to acceptable parameters set by the
* Bank's management.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with key decision makers in other banks to originate new business.
* Maintain up‑to‑date market competitor, regulatory and industry and proactively update account plans as required
* Ability to handle sophisticated transactions and engage assigned team members.
* Recommend policy amendments as when required to match with the latest business trends.



  





**Client Relationship Management** 



* To achieve assigned financial and non\-financial objectives by meeting all borrowing \& non borrowing needs of customers with target segments (E.g., borrowers, transactors, depositors).
* Prepare and Maintain Group Key Account Plans \[GKAPS] for all clients with support from relevant partners (e.g., products, international banking, Employee banking, Asset Management, etc.).
* ESG: Liaising with clients for collection of necessary data, info for preparation of ESG rating note in compliance with FAB’s ESG policy \& SOPs and its subsequent renewals at specified intervals.
* Support the timely completion of annual/periodic credit facility reviews the recommendation of appropriate credit facilities in line with the banks credit policy to balancing earnings with prudent risk management and potential credit downgrades/ upgrades.
* Develop, Implement and maintain internal controls in line with group credit policy i.e., documentation, periodical client visits / call reports, inspections and formal credit checks / informal market feedback to monitor the assigned portfolio effectively.
* Organize client meetings with relevant partners/ seniority to deepen FAB relationship within the portfolio.
* Identify \& develop cross selling opportunities and increase cross\-sell ratio and returns with clients.
* Support client on their day\-to\-day banking requirements with support from client services, CAD (as applicable).
* Achieve high degree of customer satisfaction reflected in NPS score and annual client survey reports.
* Keep abreast of market trends and manage a disciplined marketing process by identifying steps/strategies necessary to effectively initiate relationships with new to bank clients



  





**Collaboration** 



* Align with Industrials \& Manufacturing team as well as other product and coverage verticals to identify and convert opportunities.
* Collaborate with other business divisions to drive cross\-BU collaboration. Develop business proposition strategy, including competitive analysis, targeted client segmentation, service delivery and customer experience model, internal \& external campaigns and ensure alignment with other Products proposition covering Risk policies, Payment \& Cash management, Trade products, and collaboration with Retail banking including Private Banking, etc.
* Align with International banking to support client in FAB network locations.
* Support Unit/Divisional/Bank\-wide initiatives (as required or assigned).



  





**Operational** 



* Follow all relevant policies, processes, standard operating procedures, and instructions enabling work is .executed in a controlled, consistent manner and compliant.
* Conduct periodic reviews of risks (credit, operational, compliance etc.) within the portfolio on a regular basis and proactively escalate as appropriate
* Drive day\-to\-day administrative and transactional activities for the team such as client calls, documentation follow up, pipeline updates, and any other activities in the unit/team to ensure continuity of work and delivery of effective/high quality output.
* Ensure that internal processes for existing portfolio/ NTBs are in\-line with the Bank's policies \& procedures.
* Manage and follow up on KYC and compliance requirements to ensure consistency with the Bank's KYC and AML policies and regulatory requirements.
* Ensure all credit reviews are submitted on time and agreed conditions are met.
* Ensure all clients' files \[documents] are maintained.
* Maintain a satisfactory audit rating of the portfolio on an ongoing basis
* Adhere to process KPl's and, ORM, BCP \& Internal Audit requirements
* Prepare timely and accurate statements and reports to meet the unit's requirements, policies, standard
* Leadership: Act as Role Model for the entire Industrials \& Manufacturing group and demonstrating the highest standards of professionalism, integrity, and leadership behaviour.
* Lead, Mentor, Motivate, Develop and Coach team members to support career progression, skill upgradation and robust short \& long term succession plans.
* Foster a high‑performance culture, driving strong employee engagement, accountability, and a results‑oriented mindset across the team. Encourage ownership and accountability by assigning responsibilities aligned with individual capabilities and development objectives.
* Achieve individual and team's financial performance targets.
* Champion Learning and development ,attend appropriate on and off\-the\-job training programs and ensure ongoing skill enhancement, development and skill upgradation of team members.
* Involvement in team members new hirings



  





**Qualifications \& Experience** 




 Minimum Qualification:
 


* Bachelor’s degree in finance, math or related discipline.
* Master’s degree in business administration is preferred.



  





**Minimum Experience** 



* 15\+ years of experience in Banking with at least 8\+ years in senior role of team management.



  





**Knowledge, Skills, And Attributes** 



* Deep Knowledge of Wholesale Banking or investment banking.
* Understanding of FAB's product offering and business strategy.
* Ability to collaborate with a wide range of stakeholders to drive business.
* Strong relationship management skills both internally and externally.
* Sound communication skills (written and verbal).
* Ability to analyse and research information.
* Deep Financial and credit analysis ability with an aptitude to identify opportunities and close business deals.
* Data analysis and financial modelling skills.
* Ability to work under pressure and adjust quickly to changing priorities.
* Proficient in MS Office (excel, word and Power\-point).

data.title: Head of Public Policy for Middle East and Africa (MEA)
data.raw_snippet: Snap Inc is a technology company. We believe the camera presents the greatest opportunity to improve the way people live and communicate. Snap contributes to human progress by empowering people to express themselves, live in the moment, learn about the world, and have fun together. The Company’s thr
data.jd_text:
Snap Inc is a technology company. We believe the camera presents the greatest opportunity to improve the way people live and communicate. Snap contributes to human progress by empowering people to express themselves, live in the moment, learn about the world, and have fun together. The Company’s three core products are Snapchat, a visual messaging app that enhances your relationships with friends, family, and the world; Lens Studio, an augmented reality platform that powers AR across Snapchat and other services; and its AR glasses, Spectacles.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Head of Public Policy, MEA to join Snap Inc. As a member of the EMEA Public Policy team, the role reports to the Senior Director Public Policy EMEA. You will be responsible for the public policy and government relations work across the MEA region, with a particular focus on UAE and Saudi Arabia, as well as Qatar and potentially further afield in Africa. Working from our office in Dubai, you will co\-design, and execute the implementation of the public policy plan for relevant markets. The Middle East and Africa are key growth regions for Snap and our relationships with the governments and other key public stakeholders are of the utmost importance. Ensuring that Snap’s distinctive voice is heard and accommodated in policy\-making circles will be a key priority.
   

  

 The Head of Public Policy is co\-responsible for development of positions on key local and regional policy issues impacting Snap and for developing effective strategies to achieve policy outcomes and mitigate risk. This person will work closely with the rest of the Global Public Policy team, wider Legal team, regional Sales teams, the Communications team, Platform Integrity and Product teams and, on occasion, senior business executives to ensure the public policy program supports business growth and protects the company’s interests.
   

  

 What you’ll do:
   

  

* Serve as the main day\-to\-day policy representative of Snap Inc in the Middle East and Africa. Further deepen relationships with relevant government officials, NGOs, trade associations, non\-governmental organizations, and other influential stakeholders.
* Work closely with the Senior Director EMEA of Public Policy, the EMEA Public Policy team, the SVP Global Policy \& Platform Operations and, on occasion, the senior executive organization.
* Being the Policy spokesperson of the company in the region in various fora, events etc.
* Be the first to act and respond to the appropriate public policy inquiries.
* Collaborate with Public Policy, Legal and Business teams to analyze legislative initiatives, advise on risks and opportunities and develop company policy positions and messaging
* Partner with the Communications team to help them appropriately respond to Policy\-related media inquiries, by providing the correct policy narrative that best represents Snap Inc.


 Knowledge, Skills \& Abilities:
   

  

* A proven ability for shaping, and working with, government officials, NGOs, coalitions and other stakeholder groups.
* Good tech policy understanding and existing relationships within government and the wider stakeholder community in the region.
* Excellent communication and advocacy skills and sound political judgment.
* Forward thinking and proactive ability on legislative, regulatory and public policy issues. Ability to rapidly understand and master complex policy issues.
* Ability to work with Snap business to identify pertinent issues and orient the public policy team to meet priorities.
* Ability to work independently/ self\-starter in a fast\-paced, multicultural environment
* Demonstrated ability to work with a wide range of external groups and individuals, including those who are opponents or critics.
* Teammate with a positive attitude, motivation and a sense of humor
* Articulate and thoughtful.
* Able to adapt communication on complex issues for different audiences.
* A passion for Snapchat and creativity.


 Minimum Qualifications:
   

  

* Master's degree or advanced studies in law/economics/public affairs
* 10\+ years relevant experience in MENA public policy and public affairs
* Strong experience (4\+ years) on MENA tech policy, ideally working on platform regulations


 Preferred Qualifications:
   

  

* Working experience in Dubai or Riyadh
* Previous experience working with the Government or regulators or other Public institutions is a plus
* Full Arabic and English proficiency necessary


 If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please don’t be shy and provide us some information.
   

  

 "Default Together" Policy at Snap: At Snap Inc. we believe that being together in person helps us build our culture faster, reinforce our values, and serve our community, customers and partners better through dynamic collaboration. To reflect this, we practice a “default together” approach and expect our team members to work in an office 4\+ days per week.
   

  

 At Snap, we believe that having a team of diverse backgrounds and voices working together will enable us to create innovative products that improve the way people live and communicate. Snap is proud to be an equal opportunity employer, and committed to providing employment opportunities regardless of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding, age, sexual orientation, military or veteran status, or any other protected classification, in accordance with applicable federal, state, and local laws. EOE, including disability/vets.
   

  

 Our Benefits: Snap Inc. is its own community, so we’ve got your back! We do our best to make sure you and your loved ones have everything you need to be happy and healthy, on your own terms. Our benefits are built around your needs and include paid parental leave, comprehensive medical coverage, emotional and mental health support programs, and compensation packages that let you share in Snap’s long\-term success!

data.jd_text:
**Job Title:**
 Exhibitions/Programs Manager
 



**Reports to:**
 Director of Arts
 



**Location:**
 Dubai, UAE. Travel as required for projects.
 



  





**(This mandate is for one of the most prestigious Art Foundations)** 




  





**Job Description:**




 This position plays a crucial role at the Foundation in carrying out the day\-to\-day directives pertaining to gallery’s exhibitions and programme logistics. The individual will plan, coordinate, execute and monitor all exhibition and programme related operations, along with collaborative initiatives of the gallery.
 **This entails coordinating with the team, the artists and third\-parties towards exhibition design, artwork shipping, customs clearance and handling, exhibition installation and de\-installation, coordinating programmes and tours, among other responsibilities listed in detail below.** 




  





**Exhibitions:** 



* Prepare budgets for exhibitions and submit it for the director’s review
* Plan shipping and logistics of the exhibitions
* Plan and execute temporary import\-export of the
 **artworks** 
 from various
 **institutions/lenders/collectors.**
* Ensure adherence to international safety standards for
 **artwork shipments**
* Coordinating temporary exhibition insurance for the artworks
* Liaising with
 **artist/gallery** 
 for installation manual of artworks
* Coordinate and execute exhibition production (wall fabrication, painting, vinyl text, etc.)
* Plan and execute installation and de\-installation of the temporary exhibitions
* Plan and execute audio, visual and lighting of the temporary exhibitions
* Plan and source A/V equipment for exhibition including placement \& delivery and creation of manual.
* Acting as a liaison between various partners for the safety and protection of artworks.
* Scheduling of front desk and other staff for exhibition management.



  





**Programming:** 



* Coordinating with various practitioners for exhibition related programmes/ talks/ seminars/ symposiums and workshops
* Plan and execute the summer programme in consultation with the director
* Plan and execute the community outreach for the company, including coordinating with schools, colleges, universities, social clubs and cultural institutions
* Plan and execute exhibition tours, virtual and physical along with regional and international institutions



  





  





**Project Management:**




  





**Coordination and Delivery:** 



* Manage the overall operations, development and successful delivery for the Foundation, adhering strictly to the approved scope, timeline and budgets.
* Liaise closely with the Artistic Director, on\-ground team in India, and other stakeholders to ensure alignment and smooth execution of project components.
* Monitor and manage budgets for Foundation in India and UAE components, preparing budgets, payment schedules, and ensuring financial accountability.
* Coordinate with the Foundation's accounts department and project stakeholders to facilitate timely and transparent payments.
* Oversee vendor relations, and resource allocation to maximize project efficiency and deliverables.
* Manage the systematic workflow between teams and all project collaborators.
* Manage at least one international program at the Foundation, coordinating logistics, speakers, moderators.
* Ensure submission of final project completion reports and financial documentation from the Artistic Director to the Foundation.



  





**Program Management:** 



* Collaborate with the Project Advisor and Director to develop, plan, and manage programs for the Foundation in India.
* Coordinate all aspects of programming including agenda finalization, stakeholder communication, venue and virtual platform logistics, technical and audio\-visual requirements, and audience engagement.
* Oversee delivery of the three key programs committed by the team in India during the project period.
* Serve as the central point of contact ensuring smooth communication and stakeholder alignment.

**NOW HIRING A PROJECT DIRECTOR \- DELIVERY** 




  





 Our client is a leading developer in Dubai.

 The Project Director role involves leading the delivery of projects from the start of delivery to handover.

 :
 


* Deliver projects in line with agreed development strategies and execution plans.
* Secure all required permits at each stage
* Contribute to design reviews, focusing on buildability and cost optimisati. on

data.title: Director of Digital Asset Trading & Exchange Operations
data.raw_snippet:
Welcome to
 **MultiBank Group** 
 , a global financial pioneer established in 2005 in California and now proudly headquartered in Dubai, UAE. We specialize in delivering cutting\-edge trading technology, unparalleled liquidity, and exceptional customer service. Our extensive range of financial produ
data.jd_text:
Welcome to
 **MultiBank Group** 
 , a global financial pioneer established in 2005 in California and now proudly headquartered in Dubai, UAE. We specialize in delivering cutting\-edge trading technology, unparalleled liquidity, and exceptional customer service. Our extensive range of financial products includes Forex, Metals, Shares, Indices, Commodities, and Cryptocurrency CFDs.
 







 Join our thriving community of over 2 million clients across 100 countries, contributing to a daily trading volume exceeding US$ 35 billion. As a heavily regulated institution with oversight from 18\+ financial regulators across 5 continents, and recipient of over 80 financial awards, MultiBank Group is devoted to innovation, excellence, and empowering our clients to achieve their financial goals.
 



  





**mb.io** 
 is the regulated cryptocurrency exchange under MultiBank Group, offering a user\-friendly platform for instant, secure trading including Bitcoin, Ethereum and more. As we expand our offerings in the cryptocurrency space, we are looking for a
 **Director of Digital Asset Trading \& Exchange Operations** 
 to join the team.
 



  





**Role Overview:** 




  





 We are seeking a senior crypto trading leader to build, lead, and scale a new chapter in our digital asset trading capabilities. This is a strategic and hands\-on role responsible for shaping and advancing the firm’s crypto trading, liquidity, exchange infrastructure, and derivatives capabilities. The role spans
 **OTC, perpetuals, funding logic, market making, liquidity sourcing, hedging, and market structure design** 
 , while also playing an important part in the strategy surrounding token\-related initiatives, exchange engagement, and broader platform growth.
 



  





 The ideal candidate will bring a strong combination of
 **trading leadership, derivatives expertise, liquidity and market\-making experience, token exposure, and operational depth** 
 . They should understand how to build and scale a crypto trading function that is commercially effective, technically sound, and aligned with a more structured and institutional operating environment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  





**Trading Leadership \& Strategy** 



* Lead and scale the crypto trading function across Spot, Derivatives, OTC, and Market Making.
* Define and execute the overall trading strategy in alignment with the company’s growth plans, platform roadmap, and commercial objectives.
* Take ownership of the trading desk’s performance, operating model, and long\-term capability buildout.
* Develop a clear framework for how the business prices risk, sources liquidity, manages execution, and supports product growth.



  





**Derivatives, OTC \& Pricing** 



* Lead the design and launch of the derivatives trading capability from the ground up, including perpetual products, funding logic, hedging frameworks, and exposure management — this is a greenfield build requiring someone who has stood up a derivatives desk before.
* Lead the development of OTC pricing and execution frameworks, including liquidity sourcing, cross\-venue hedging logic, and real\-time pricing across crypto and fiat pairs.
* Ensure pricing, execution, and risk systems reflect actual market behaviour and support sustainable commercial performance.
* Improve the desk’s ability to manage complex market conditions, funding dynamics, and non\-linear risk.



  





**Market Making, Liquidity \& Market Structure** 



* Design and oversee
 **market\-making strategies** 
 to optimise liquidity, spreads, order book depth, and execution efficiency.
* Define and execute
 **liquidity strategy across exchanges and providers** 
 , improving access, reducing slippage, and enhancing execution quality.
* Shape
 **market structure, execution workflows, and venue strategy** 
 to support client flow and platform growth.
* Develop frameworks to manage
 **flow dynamics, adverse selection, and client behaviour** 
 effectively.
* Manage liquidity across
 **CEX and DEX environments (including AMMs)** 
 , optimising execution in both off\-chain and on\-chain markets.
* Oversee integration with
 **custodial providers (e.g. Fireblocks)** 
 , addressing latency, settlement, and operational coordination.
* Drive
 **end\-to\-end latency optimisation** 
 across order routing, signing, and on\-chain settlement.
* Maintain
 **tight spreads and consistent market depth across venues** 
 , managing fragmented liquidity and multi\-exchange listings.



  





**Token Strategy \& Exchange Engagement** 



* Lead token trading and liquidity strategy, including managing simultaneous listings across multiple Tier 1 CEXs, coordinating with exchange listing teams, meeting liquidity requirements, and managing launch windows and post\-listing market support.
* Manage cross\-exchange price consistency, arbitrage mitigation, and unified order book strategy to minimise price discrepancies and adverse arbitrage pressure when the token is live on multiple venues.
* Work closely with relevant stakeholders on exchange relationships, listing processes, and ongoing liquidity support across key venues.
* Ensure token and exchange strategy are underpinned by strong compliance awareness, including wash trading monitoring, market manipulation prevention, and adherence to exchange\-specific listing rules and regulatory requirements.



  





**Spot Platform \& Exchange Infrastructure** 



* Oversee spot trading pair selection, curation, and lifecycle management on the MBIO platform, ensuring pairs are commercially viable and supported by adequate liquidity.
* Bring hands\-on experience with
 **matching engine architecture, order book design, and trade settlement workflows** 
 , working with technology teams to deliver best\-in\-class execution and liquidity on the platform.
* Optimise on\-platform settlement processes and ensure seamless integration between the matching engine, custodial layer, and external liquidity sources.



  





**Risk, Governance \& Infrastructure** 



* Own risk management across trading books, liquidity operations, token\-related exposure, and counterparty activity.
* Build robust controls around inventory, hedging, funding, execution, liquidity, and operational escalation.
* Partner with technology teams on execution tools, APIs, pricing systems, automation, and trading infrastructure.
* Ensure that trading activity operates within a strong governance and compliance framework suitable for a serious and growing platform.



  





**Cross\-functional Leadership** 



* Work closely with Product, Technology, Risk, Compliance, Operations, and senior management to align trading strategy with business objectives.
* Act as the senior internal owner for all matters related to trading logic, liquidity architecture, market structure, and execution design.
* Support decisions that sit across commercial strategy and trading reality, ensuring the platform is built in a way that is both scalable and market\-relevant.



  





**Reporting \& Senior Management Communication** 



* Establish and maintain
 **structured reporting frameworks** 
 covering trading performance, P\&L, risk exposure, liquidity metrics, and market conditions, ensuring senior management has full visibility at all times.
* Deliver regular dashboards, commentary, and strategic updates to the executive team, translating complex trading dynamics into clear, actionable insights.
* Proactively escalate material risks, market events, or operational issues with clear recommendations and proposed action plans.



  





**Team Building \& Management** 



* Build, lead, and mentor a high\-calibre trading team and supporting trading operations capability.
* Create a culture of accountability, speed, analytical rigour, and disciplined execution.
* Strengthen the function in a way that supports scale without compromising control, performance, or market edge.'



  





**Candidate Profile:** 




  




* 7\+ years of experience in
 **crypto trading, derivatives, OTC, liquidity management, or market making.**
* Proven track record of
 **building or leading a crypto trading function** 
 within a structured or institutional environment.
* Strong expertise in
 **derivatives trading** 
 , including perpetuals, funding, hedging, pricing, and risk management.
* Solid experience in
 **OTC execution, liquidity sourcing, market making, and cross\-venue trading strategies.**
* Deep understanding of
 **market structure, liquidity dynamics, exchange microstructure, and client flow behaviour.**
* Experience working with
 **tier\-1 crypto exchanges, liquidity providers, and token\-related trading environments** 
 (including listings or post\-launch support).
* Good command of
 **quantitative or systematic trading concepts** 
 , with the ability to collaborate with technical teams.
* Hands\-on experience with
 **DEXs (e.g. Uniswap), custodial platforms (e.g. Fireblocks), and hybrid CEX/DEX environments** 
 , including latency and settlement considerations.
* Familiarity with
 **trading infrastructure** 
 , including matching engines, order books, and execution systems.
* Proven ability to manage
 **fragmented liquidity, cross\-exchange pricing, and arbitrage dynamics.**
* Strong
 **leadership, judgment, and crisis management skills** 
 in high\-pressure market conditions.



  





**Preferred Background:** 




  




* Experience within a
 **crypto exchange, market maker, liquidity provider, prop trading firm, or institutional digital asset platform.**
* Exposure to both
 **centralised and decentralised trading environments.**
* Experience supporting
 **token listings, launches, or liquidity programmes.**
* Familiarity with
 **trading infrastructure** 
 , including pricing systems, funding mechanisms, and execution frameworks.
* Experience operating in
 **institutional or regulated environments** 
 with strong governance and controls.
* Proven ability to manage
 **external partners and counterparties** 
 , including exchanges, custodians, and liquidity providers.
* Understanding of
 **exchange requirements, market\-making obligations, and multi\-jurisdictional considerations.**



  





**Why Join Us?** 




  




* Work with an industry\-leading global financial institution.
* Competitive salary and comprehensive employee benefits.
* Opportunities for professional growth and career advancement.
* Collaborative, inclusive, and dynamic work environment.
* Commitment to innovation and professional excellence.



  





*Become part of our international community at MultiBank Group and mb.io, dedicated to excellence, innovation, and shaping the future of digital finance.*

data.jd_text:
**Description**
 As a Program Manager, you'll be at the forefront of transforming experiences across the Middle East and North Africa. Your strategic insights and collaborative approach will directly impact how sellers and customers interact with Amazon's ecosystem, driving innovation and operational excellence.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Develop and Execute Product Vision: Craft comprehensive product strategies that align with customer needs and business objectives
* Data\-Driven Decision Making: Analyze complex data sets to uncover actionable insights and drive product improvements
* Competitive Intelligence: Conduct thorough market research and competitive analysis to identify strategic opportunities
* Customer Research: Lead initiatives to deeply understand customer preferences, pain points, and emerging expectations
* Process Optimization: Develop comprehensive understanding of domestic and international fulfillment processes
* Performance Management: Establish robust tracking mechanisms for pilot initiatives and seller engagement
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Facilitate regular communication and alignment across diverse teams and geographies


 A day in the life
   

  

 Your day will be dynamic and impactful, focusing on creating seamless connections between various business units. You'll navigate complex projects, engage with cross\-functional teams, and develop innovative solutions that enhance our operational capabilities. Each day presents an opportunity to solve intricate challenges and drive meaningful improvements.
   

  

**About The Team**
 We are a collaborative group passionate about creating seamless, intuitive customer experiences. Our team values innovative thinking, data\-driven decision\-making, and a commitment to continuous improvement. We believe in empowering our team members to challenge conventions and develop solutions.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent
* Knowledge of Excel at an intermediate level (e.g., pivot tables \& charts, multiple criteria lookups, nested logical/IF formulas, data cleansing, array formulas, etc.)
* 1\+ years of program or project management experience


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in MS Access and SQL
* Speak, write, and read fluently in Arabic


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- Amazon Middle East and North Africa FZ\-LLC
   

  

 Job ID: A3166246

data.raw_snippet:
**Position Description:** 




 Supports the Director of Risk Management in the operational delivery of the risk management program. Assists in the implementation and monitoring of the effectiveness of the risk management program within American Hospital Dubai. Supports organizational learning and e
data.jd_text:
**Position Description:** 




 Supports the Director of Risk Management in the operational delivery of the risk management program. Assists in the implementation and monitoring of the effectiveness of the risk management program within American Hospital Dubai. Supports organizational learning and ensures American Hospital Dubai is meeting its regulatory and accreditation obligations.
 



  





**Position Responsibility:** 



* Supports and monitors the risk management program taking a proactive approach to help minimize and mitigate clinical risk.
* Supports internal risk identification mechanisms including, but not limited to incident reports, medical record reviews, clinical audits, patient complaints, claims and risk assessments.
* Investigates patient safety issues and incidents within the organization and report patient safety data in actionable formats
* Demonstrates a strong overview of the progress of incident and complaint investigations and ensures the Director of Risk Management is informed of any issues or risks.
* Supports the process for reporting and updating information relating to patient safety incidents, complaints and near misses.
* Promotes patient safety during the review of incident and complaint data, aiming to enhance patient outcomes and the effectiveness of care.
* Analyzes complex information from claims, incident, and complaint investigations to formulate suitable action plans that foster positive change Supports the collection, analysis and presentation of quantitative and qualitative risk management data (Incidents, complaints, claims) to measure the impact of change and monitor ongoing improvement efforts.
* Participates in proactive risk reduction activities using such tools as Failure Mode Effect Analysis and Hazard Vulnerability Analysis.
* Participates in educational presentations that facilitate the understanding and implementation of patient safety and risk management practices
* Ensures the safekeeping of investigation reports and associated documentation related to sentinel events.



  





**Position Qualification:** 



* Bachelor's Degree in healthcare\-related field or equivalent professional qualification (current license preferred).
* Master's Degree in Risk Management or related healthcare field preferred
* Certified Professional Healthcare Risk Management (CPHRM) preferred
* Certified Professional in\-Patient Safety (CPPS) preferred



  





**PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE:** 



* Minimum of three (3\) to five (5\) years of recent experience in Risk Management and Patient Safety in a related hospital environment
* Knowledge of managing clinical risk within a healthcare setting
* Knowledge of principles, methods, procedures, and current trends in health information data management
* Knowledge of accreditation programs and surveys
* Knowledge of developing standards, policies, and procedures
* Skills in managing large, complex projects and initiatives
* Skills in developing innovative and creative solutions to achieve organisational objectives within a clinical improvement setting
* Ability to solve problems, evaluate, plan, and direct process improvement projects for all clinical departments
* Ability to influence at a strategic level and engage with clinicians

data.jd_text:
**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** 




  




* Directs, coaches, supports, supervises, and evaluates (with the Sous Chef) all direct reports.
* Must have excellent food knowledge and a full understanding of culinary terms.
* Must be able to read, understand, follow, and prepare company recipes by maintaining the quality and consistency in taste according to the instructions provided by the corporate office.
* Must be proficient in completing tasks, work efficiently and productively.
* Must be able to work in any section of a kitchen.
* Coordinate and supervise all team members assigned to their section, assign and delegate tasks accordingly.
* Undertake recipe reviews daily. Maintain recipe folders in immaculate condition.
* Responsible for follow\-through on any request within the area of responsibility received from the direct supervisor or manager on duty; this may include show plates, food samples and random food tastings.
* Control production levels and recommend ideas for improvements and better cost controlling.
* Prepare daily electronic food requisitions needed for his section production and countercheck deliveries for its accuracy; Report any discrepancies to his immediate supervisor.
* Must be able to oversee any main section (Sauce, Entremetier, Fish, Roast, Outlet CDP, Tournant and Cold Kitchen) and its entire food production.
* Maintain and ensure that Public Health are followed according to company standards and expectation (referring to US, Anvisa, Shipsan, Canadian, Australian etc.) and always followed within their section.
* Ensures that the HACCP program is carried out correctly.
* Maintains their assigned area in preparation for announced or unannounced United States Public Health type inspection either done by the Food \& Beverage Director or the actual inspectors.
* Reports for duty at assigned times, follows their supervisor’s instructions, and ensures that personal appearance, uniform, and personal hygiene are in accordance with the company’s rules and regulations.



  





**FINANCIAL RESPONSIBILITIES** 




  




* This position is responsible for cost containment through the proper use, handling and maintenance of records, reports, supplies and equipment.
* Identifies potential expense reductions through cost control.
* Analyzes operational problems and establishes controls.
* Reviews timesheets and forwards them to the Executive Chef for approval.
* May prepare a variety of reports and letters utilizing personal computer system and equipment.
* Ensures that items are requisitioned in correct quantities, within acceptable timeframes and in accordance with established control procedures.
* Conducts workstation spot checks to ensure items are correctly stored to minimize deterioration and waste.



  





**MOTIVATIONAL RESPONSIBILITIES** 




  




* Monitors and manages the various assigned workstation functions.
* Monitors the assignment of duties and responsibilities to their staff.
* Observes and evaluates staff and work procedures to ensure quality standards and service are met.
* Makes recommendations regarding personnel actions such as new hire requests and discharges, to ensure adequate and continuous staffing.
* Inspects workstations, work areas, equipment, etc. to ensure efficient service and conformance to standards.



  





**QUALIFICATIONS AND EDUCATION** 




  




* A minimum of 8 years in an upscale hotel, resort, cruise ship or convention banqueting service and at least 2 years as Chef de Partie (shipboard experience preferred).
* A culinary school degree is required.
* Very strong management skills in a multicultural and dynamic environment.
* Very strong communication, problem solving, decision making, and interpersonal skills.
* Superior customer service, teambuilding, and conflict resolution skills.
* Knowledge of the principles and processes for providing personalized services including needs assessment techniques, quality service standards, alternative delivery systems, and guest satisfaction evaluation techniques.
* Strong planning, coaching, organizing, staffing, controlling, and evaluating skills.
* Intermediate computer software skills required.
* Possess a good understanding of basic accounting principles such as numbering flow, “Debits/Credits”, adjusting entries, and corrections.
* Ability to write reports and business correspondence and to establish a good rapport with the ship’s Senior Officers and the corporate office.



  





*Internal Candidate Requirements:* 




 In addition to the stated hiring requirements, internal candidates are required to fulfill the following:
 


* Completion of at least two contracts as Chef Tournant with a performance rating of satisfactory or above, along with demonstrated leadership skills.

data.title: Executive Director, Head of MENA, Real Estate Finance
data.raw_snippet:
**JOB PURPOSE:** 




 Senior role within the Real Estate Finance team with the purpose of originating and executing Real Estate Finance transactions for CIB clients of the Bank and to support the real estate transactions of wider REF team globally. Develop strategic relationships with banks and rea
data.jd_text:
**JOB PURPOSE:** 




 Senior role within the Real Estate Finance team with the purpose of originating and executing Real Estate Finance transactions for CIB clients of the Bank and to support the real estate transactions of wider REF team globally. Develop strategic relationships with banks and real estate professionals to identify REF opportunities that are aligned to FAB’s client and credit appetite. Work closely with the Corporate and Financial Institutions coverage teams and product teams of FAB.
 



 To act as a centre of excellence for Real Estate financing in the Bank. To ensure an environment and culture of origination and creative thinking and solutions are fostered at all times
 



 Work closely with all departments of the Bank to ensure deal opportunities are activated and communication is harmonised.
 



  





**KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES:** 




 The role encompasses, enhancing the bank's capabilities in the real estate finance covering all forms of RE finance structures in addition to identifying opportunities for equity origination and deal placement. This will involve:
 


* Meeting clients/sponsors.
* Originating, structuring and executing new deals along with the coverage \& credit team.
* Thoroughly review the existing CRE loan book and identify opportunities to secure existing loans business through a combination of refinance and restructuring.
* Build a platform for growth to support new business initiatives across the FAB footprint.
* Working with other market leaders on transactions and further enhancing FAB’s international profile.
* Taking the lead in pricing discussions with clients.
* Working on internal reporting, MIS requirements and support the Head of REF in strategic initiatives.
* Help contribute to the GCF budget in addition to being alive to opportunities in our GM, Agency \& DCM businesses.
* The person will be responsible for buildingassets and achieving budget via P\&L both on a shadow income (hedging income) perspective for deals bookedand a hard cash basis for underwriting skim, structuring \& participation fees.



**Budgets and Plans:** 



* Contribute to the preparation of the sub\-departmental budget and monitor the section’s cost ratio and make the Head of Real Estate Finance aware of performance gaps with suggestions to rectify and improve performance.



  





**Internal Collaboration:** 



* Maintain strong internal relations and collaborate with Coverage partners (IBG, FIG, Corporate Banking, New Client Acquisition) in order to maximise product development \& revenue generation opportunities.
* Develop service level targets and manage the coordination of the section with other departments to meet service expectations.



  





**Policies, Systems, Processes, \& Procedures:** 



* Implement departmental policies, systems, and procedure so that all relevant procedural/ legislative requirements are fulfilled while delivering a quality and cost\-effective service.



  





**MIS and Reports:** 




 Supervise and provide inputs in the preparation of timely and accurate sub\-departmental statements and reports (esp. the Underwriting \& Sales Report) to meet FAB’s and departmental requirements, policies, and standards.
 



  





**QUALIFICATIONS \& EXPERIENCE:** 




**Knowledge \& Experience:** 



* Degree in Finance, Accounting, Business or a related discipline.
* 10\+ years of experience in managing and facilitating real estate loans business in a banking environment.
* In\-depth knowledge of the Real Estate sector, and FAB’s products and business strategies.
* Deep understanding and working knowledge of international real estate debt markets and syndicated loan \& debt capital market.



**Skills:** 



* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Ability to understand financing structures based on the current \& expected market conditions.
* Ability to multi\-task with strong credit, structuring and LMA documentation, expertise required.
* Strong negotiating skills and ability to exercise good judgment which balances needs of client, investors and FAB.
* Solid understanding of accounting and financial statements.
* Ability to work under pressure and adjust quickly to changing priorities.
* Ability to build and develop strategic relationships.

data.title: HR Business Partner - UAE
data.raw_snippet:
Job description:
   

  

**The Opportunity** 

 Reporting to the Middle East HR Director, the HR Business Partner – UAE plays a pivotal role in shaping a high\-performance and engaging employee experience across our retail network.
 



 This is a true generalist HR role with strong retail proximit
data.jd_text:
Job description:
   

  

**The Opportunity** 

 Reporting to the Middle East HR Director, the HR Business Partner – UAE plays a pivotal role in shaping a high\-performance and engaging employee experience across our retail network.
 



 This is a true generalist HR role with strong retail proximity — combining operational excellence with strategic impact. You will act as a trusted advisor to leaders, a visible presence in stores, and a strong ambassador of Puig’s culture and values.
 



 While retail remains the primary focus, the role also contributes to broader HR initiatives across the region providing exposure to a wider organizational scope.
 



 If you are passionate about retail, believe in being close to the field, and gain energy from store visits, engaging conversations and translating business realities into impactful people solutions, this role is for you.
 


**What you'll get to do** 

  
 



 Partnering \& Talent Management
 


* Partner closely with retail leaders to align people priorities with business strategy
* Act as a trusted advisor on organizational design, team structure, performance, engagement, and change management.
* Drive the full retail performance management cycle, enabling meaningful feedback conversations and development planning.
* Lead the annual talent review process for retail teams, building succession pipelines and identifying high\-potential talent.
* Attract, develop, and retain top retail talent, ensuring strong workforce planning and proactive hiring strategies.
* Support recruitment at all levels, including career fairs and assessment centers ensuring an inclusive and high\-quality candidate experience.
* Maintain strong field presence through regular store visits to stay close to teams and understand operational realities.
* Use people analytics and KPIs to identify trends, build action plans, and influence business decisions.




 Employee Lifecycle \& HR Operations
 


* Oversee the full employee lifecycle, from onboarding to exit partnering with HR Operations team to ensure seamless execution.
* Manage pre\-boarding, onboarding, probation follow\-up, exit processes and ensure accurate documentation.
* Conduct and analyse exit interviews to identify themes and drive continuous improvement.
* In partnership with local HR Operations, oversee and manage employee contractual changes including offers, promotions, salary adjustments and status changes
* Oversee and manage employee relations matters in partnership with the local HR Operations team, coaching managers on performance, absence management, and disciplinary processes while ensuring compliance, fairness and sound judgment.
* Ensure completion of mandatory corporate trainings and policy adherence.



 Culture and Engagement
 


* Act as a strong ambassador of Puig culture and values across the retail network.
* Co\-design and implement engagement initiatives aligned with employee feedback and business priorities.
* Champion well\-being, diversity, equity and inclusion across every stage of the employee journey.
* Drive recognition programs that celebrate performance, key milestones reinforcing a culture of appreciation and belonging.
* Leverage employee feedback and engagement insights to build action plans that strengthen retention and team effectiveness.
* Promote internal communication platforms to foster connection, transparency and create a sense of community.
* Drive employer branding and people storytelling initiatives, including LinkedIn campaigns and internal communications, to strengthen Puig’s positioning as an employer of choice.



 Reward \& Budget
 


* Drive the annual salary review process and oversee retail commission scheme effectiveness.
* Support market benchmarking to ensure competitive retail compensation and benefits.
* Ensure data integrity within SuccessFactors, maintaining accurate employee master data to support payroll, reporting and decision\-making.
* Monitor and manage the retail HR budget, partnering closely with Finance \& Payroll on reporting and forecasting.
* Review and validate monthly payroll, ensuring all employee changes are accurately captured prior to final HR approval.



 Broader HR \& Regional Contribution
 


* Design and manage the full Graduate Program lifecycle, ensuring a strong candidate experience, structured development journey and clear pathways into permanent roles where available.
* Support recruitment and onboarding for selected head office roles (below Director level).
* Manage the Emiratization program and ensure compliance with UAE national hiring requirements.
* Contribute to regional HR projects and initiatives that elevate the overall employee experience across markets.
* Provide HR operational support to head office populations as required, while maintaining primary focus on retail


**We'd love to meet you if you have** 
* Proven experience as an HR Business Partner, ideally within retail, beauty, luxury or fast\-paced environments.
* A genuine passion for retail and a strong belief in Retail HR as a strategic, long\-term focus.
* High operational rigor with excellent attention to detail.
* Strong analytical capability and confidence working with HR systems and Excel.
* Ability to balance strategic thinking with hands\-on execution.
* Strong influencing, coaching and stakeholder management skills.
* A collaborative, solutions\-oriented and positive mindset.
* Fluent in English (Arabic is a plus).


**A few things you'll love about us** 
* An entrepreneurial, creative and welcoming work culture
* A range of learning and development opportunities
* An international company with plenty of opportunities to grow
* A competitive compensation \& benefits package

data.title: Social Worker
data.raw_snippet:
**KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES** 




  





**Casework \& Beneficiary Support** 




 • Conduct needs assessments and provide appropriate case management.
 



 • Deliver psychosocial support and referrals to beneficiaries.
 



 • Maintain accurate and confidential records of all cases.
 



 • Undertake
data.jd_text:
**KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES** 




  





**Casework \& Beneficiary Support** 




 • Conduct needs assessments and provide appropriate case management.
 



 • Deliver psychosocial support and referrals to beneficiaries.
 



 • Maintain accurate and confidential records of all cases.
 



 • Undertake visits to beneficiary sites for inspecting and vetting process
 



 • Prepare periodical reports, case summaries as and when required by the management
 



  





**Program Implementation \& Community Outreach** 




 • Support execution of workshops, awareness, volunteering \& fund\-raising campaigns, and outreach initiatives.
 



 • Conduct field visits, meetings with vendors and partners to ensure effective delivery of programs. • Mobilize community members to participate in Foundation initiatives.
 



  





**Collaboration \& Reporting** 




 • Coordinate with internal teams, program managers, and external partners.
 



 • Prepare reports, case studies, and beneficiary feedback for monitoring and evaluation.
 



 • Escalate sensitive or complex cases to the Program Manager or Director General.
 



  





**Compliance \& Professional Standards** 




 • Ensure safeguarding, protection, and confidentiality of all beneficiary data.
 



 • Comply with organizational policies, ethical codes of practice, and legal requirements.
 



 • Promote DP World’s values and represent the Foundation positively. Perform other secondary tasks as assigned by the management.
 



  





**Job Context** 




 The role is performed in community\-based settings, often dealing with sensitive social issues requiring empathy, resilience, and discretion. The outsourced Social Worker functions as part of a team, ensuring smooth delivery of program activities in collaboration with internal staff and external service providers. The role requires flexibility to adapt to dynamic program needs and changing community priorities, while maintaining professional standards and safeguarding requirements.
 



  





**Job Type:** 
 Contract (6months)
 



**Salary** 
 : 10K AED
 



  





**QUALIFICATIONS, EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS** 




  





**Education \& Professional Background:** 




 • Bachelor’s degree in Social Work, Psychology, Sociology, or related field.
 



 • Certification in counselling, case management, or social services is desirable.
 



  





**Experience \& Knowledge :** 




 • Minimum 2–3 years’ experience in social services, NGO projects, or community development.
 



 • Experience working with vulnerable groups, such as children, families, or marginalized communities.
 



 • Knowledge of referral pathways and local support networks.
 



  





**Skills \& Competencies:** 




 • Strong communication, empathy, and cultural awareness.
 



 • Ability to manage multiple cases effectively. • Good reporting, documentation, and IT skills (MS Office).
 



 • Fluency in English is required; Arabic is an advantage
