**Adobe Middle East**
 Adobe in the Middle East empowers businesses and individuals through creativity and digital transformation. In Saudi Arabia, we support Vision 2030 by driving innovation, developing local talent, and enabling exceptional customer experiences. As the regional headquarters for foreign companies, Adobe serves as a strategic hub for growth and collaboration across markets. Join us to help shape the future of digital experiences in one of the world’s most dynamic region.
   

  

**Our Company**
 Changing the world through digital experiences is what Adobe’s all about. We give everyone—from emerging artists to global brands—everything they need to design and deliver exceptional digital experiences. We’re passionate about empowering people to craft beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, and transform how companies interact with customers across every screen.
   

  

 We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to building exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access to equal opportunity. We realize that new ideas can come from everywhere in the organization, and we know the next big idea could be yours!
   

  

 We believe innovative ideas can emerge from any team member, including you.
   

  

**The Role**
 Join Adobe’s Professional Services organization in Riyadh as a Programme Manager/Principal Project Manager – Strategic Governance, where you will lead executive\-level engagement, steer digital transformation governance, and drive the strategic value realization of Adobe’s enterprise programs across the Middle East. In this senior individual contributor role, you will be a key advisor to C\-suite stakeholders and VPs, ensuring that Adobe’s platform vision, transformation roadmap, and Centers of Excellence (CoE) models translate into measurable customer outcomes.
   

  

 We are seeking a Programme Manager/Principal Project Manager who can provide strategic oversight, executive governance, and multi\-workstream orchestration for Adobe’s most critical regional customers. This role goes beyond delivery execution: it blends program governance, stakeholder management, business value realization, and transformation leadership to ensure that clients establish the right operating model, capabilities, and CoE structure to scale digital experiences.
   

  

 As a trusted partner to both customers and Adobe’s sales organization, you will also play a vital role in helping account teams position the strategic importance of Digital Transformation Centers of Excellence, articulating how governance, operating models, and cross\-functional alignment accelerate transformation maturity and long\-term customer success.
   

  

**What You Will Do (Key Responsibilities)**
* Lead executive and strategic governance for Adobe programs across multiple enterprise and government clients, ensuring alignment with strategic business outcomes.
* Establish, guide, and mature Digital Transformation Centers of Excellence (CoEs), enabling customers to scale Adobe capabilities, institutionalize best practices, and build sustainable governance and innovation frameworks.
* Drive end\-to\-end program leadership, orchestrating multi\-workstream delivery across Experience Cloud solutions, data platforms, content supply chain, and digital experience operations.
* Serve as the primary point of contact for strategic clients, building trusted relationships and ensuring business alignment
* Partner closely with the Adobe Sales team to position Adobe’s transformation approach, ensuring customers understand the value of strong governance, CoE maturity, and structured transformation roadmaps.
* Facilitate strategic workshops, steering committees, and cross\-functional executive engagements to maintain alignment, de\-risk delivery, and maximize value realization.
* Monitor and report on program performance, KPIs, and business value impact, ensuring clear visibility to customer leadership and Adobe stakeholders.
* Ensure operational excellence through strong oversight of schedules, budgets, dependencies, risks, and delivery quality across all engagements.
* Drive account growth by identifying opportunities for additional services and value creation.
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, and Global Services teams to ensure customer needs are anticipated and addressed with the right solutions and delivery approach.
* Support program innovation by identifying opportunities for optimization, new use cases, and maturity acceleration through Adobe technologies and best practices.
* Apply Adobe’s services methodology, apprentice others in the methodology, and drive continuous improvements in our ways of working


**What You Need To Succeed**
* 10\+ years of experience leading projects in a consulting and/or technology professional services organization
* Experience providing consulting services to high\-tech customers is desirable
* Engaging people leader with demonstrable ability to lead and encourage teams
* Strong executive presence, including the ability to partner with and effectively influence client managers, directors, VPs, CMOs, and CXOs
* Proven organizational skills to plan and coordinate complex projects
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* High degree of intellectual curiosity and ability to absorb new concepts quickly
* High level of energy and personal drive
* Experience with one or more of the following: digital marketing automation, web content management, personalisation, ecommerce, web analytics and tag management, technology/software/SAAS concepts, custom software development processes and methodologies (including managing Agile projects and scaled agile), technology project management, and governance
* Familiarity with local regulations and business practices in the Saudi Arabia and Middle East
* Fluency in English and Arabic


 At Adobe, you will be immersed in an exceptional work environment that is recognized throughout the world on Best Companies lists. You will also be surrounded by colleagues who are committed to helping each other grow through our unique Check\-In approach where ongoing feedback flows freely.
   

  

 If you’re looking to make an impact, Adobe's the place for you. Discover what our employees are saying about their career experiences on the Adobe Life blog and explore the meaningful benefits we offer.
   

  

 Adobe is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome and encourage diversity in the workplace regardless of race, gender, religion, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, or veteran status.
   

  

**About Adobe**
 Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry\-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
   

  

 Our 30,000\+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
   

  

**Let’s Adobe together**
 At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture, focus on people, purpose and community, Adobe for All, comprehensive benefits programs, the stories we tell, the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
   

  

 Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
   

  

 Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call \+1 408\-536\-3015\.
   

  

**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**
 Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
   

  

 At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience.

data.jd_text:
Mace combines construction expertise with consultancy to unlock potential in every person or project and redefine the boundaries of ambition. Our values shape the way we consult and define the people we want to join us on our journey.
   

  

**The Project**
 This is an opportunity to work on one of the largest programmes in Saudi Arabia. This unique project consists of major mixed\-use development including sports facilities, entertainment, and arts along with all associated infrastructure.
   

  

**You’ll Be Responsible For**
* Supports project delivery by updating plans, tracking changes, and preparing handover documentation.
* Coordinates with stakeholders to uphold quality, safety, and wellbeing standards.
* Conducts research and analysis to inform project decisions.
* Assists in managing risks, sustainability goals, and third\-party engagements.
* Coordinates project technical services and resources, delivering objectives in line with the Project Plan.
* Manages time, cost, risk and quality, ensuring robust governance, reporting and stakeholder coordination.
* Supports senior project managers with programme delivery, procurement and contract administration.
* Oversees meetings, site reviews, documentation, change control and handover requirements.
* Manages consultants, contractors and supply chain performance across scope, fees and deliverables.


**You’ll Need To Have**
* Tertiary qualification or equivalent experience.
* Working towards or holds MCIOB/MAPM/MRICS (or local equivalent).
* Developing project management and construction knowledge.
* Strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder engagement skills.


**Our values**
**Safety first \- Going home safe and well:** 
 We champion a safe, diverse, and inclusive working environment, understanding the importance of well\-being in every team.
   

  

**Client focus \- Deliver on our promise:** 
 We own the quality of deliverables and strategic outcomes and build long\-term relationships with our clients.
   

  

**Integrity \- Always do the right thing:** 
 We influence positive outcomes within our industry while always aligning with our compliance obligations.
   

  

**Create opportunity \- For our people to excel:** 
 We champion a continuous improvement culture throughout all activities, inspiring our people and teams to develop.
   

  

 Mace is an inclusive employer and welcomes interest from a diverse range of candidates. Even if you feel you do not fulfill all the criteria, please apply, as you may still be the best candidate for this role or another role within our organisation.
   

  

 We are also open to discussing part\-time, flexible, and hybrid working options if suitable within the role.

data.title: General Manager, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
data.raw_snippet: Imagine a piloted air taxi that takes off vertically, then quietly carries you and your fellow passengers over the congested city streets below, enabling you to spend more time with the people and places that matter most. At Joby, we've been working to make that dream a reality since 2009 and we're
data.jd_text:
Imagine a piloted air taxi that takes off vertically, then quietly carries you and your fellow passengers over the congested city streets below, enabling you to spend more time with the people and places that matter most. At Joby, we've been working to make that dream a reality since 2009 and we're now in the final stages of certifying our aircraft with the FAA. With plans to launch our aircraft in the US and Dubai, we're now scaling manufacturing and preparing for the launch of our commercial service.
   

  

**Overview**
 As the leader for Joby’s future presence in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, you will build the business from the ground up, establishing the foundational relationships, operating model, and multi\-year strategy needed to launch a safe, compliant, and scalable service. Partnering closely with Joby’s senior leadership and U.S. headquarters teams, you will drive government and municipal engagement, develop strategic partnerships (including JVs and M\&A), and lead end\-to\-end deal execution. You will serve as Joby’s local face, elevating brand awareness, representing the company with stakeholders and media, translating market insights into action, and providing clear performance updates to executive leadership and the board.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Build the Business Foundation: Lay the foundation for the future KSA market for Joby
* Policy and Partnerships: In partnership with Joby’s senior leadership team, identify, build, and maintain strong relationships with local government entities, municipalities, and strategic partners to build trust and credibility, thereby strengthening Joby’s position in the KSA
* Corporate and Business Development: Source, evaluate, and execute M\&A, joint ventures, and strategic partnerships. Lead cross\-functional due diligence and manage deal execution from start to finish in the KSA
* Drive Strategic Execution: Implement a vision and multi\-year business strategy that balances execution across aircraft sales, business development, corporate development, government relations, OEM, manufacturing, and operations
* Develop Market Awareness: stay apprised of local trends, business opportunities, infrastructure opportunities, consumer mobility preferences, etc., within the KSA, and build action plans to exploit opportunities for Joby
* Collaborate with US Team: Work cross\-functionally with Joby’s US\-based headquarters functions to support global strategic initiatives and to support partner(s) in launching a successful, safe, and compliant service in the KSA
* Establish the Joby Brand Locally: Gather market insights and work closely with Joby’s marketing, business development, and communications teams to build a highly recognizable brand within the KSA
* Be the Local Face of Joby: Serve as the primary local representative of Joby at KSA events and with local press to drive awareness and early adoption
* Report to Joby Leadership: Provide regular updates on business performance and identify areas requiring support from the executive team and board of director s


**Required**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience
* 10\+ years of experience in M\&A, Corporate Development, Program Management, Business Development, Government Relations, and/or Strategy
* 10\+ years of leadership experience, with increasing levels of responsibility
* Highly strategic thinker with strong business acumen and structured problem\-solving skills demonstrated through delivery of large complex projects/programs
* Excellent communication and presentation skills; able to influence at all levels,inspire teams, collaborate cross\-functionally, and represent the organization with external stakeholders
* An entrepreneurial mindset is suited for launching and scaling a new entity
* Exceptional ability to build and execute on a growth strategy
* Extensive professional network within the KSA and the Middle East, and proven ability to develop and maintain relationships
* Fluent in English and Arabic, both written and verbal communication
* Able to travel up to 30% of the time, including to the United States
* Legally able to work in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, or have the ability to be sponsored for a work visa


**Desired**
* MBA or advanced degree in a relevant industry
* Strong policy exposure and knowledge of regulatory frameworks (GACA, FAA, EASA)
* Proven track record of P\&L management
* Experience in the aviation or aerospace industry
* Previously launched and scaled a business or business unit
* Broad business experience in the Middle East
* Experienced in government and military relations and operations


**Additional Information**
**Joby is an Equal Opportunity Employer**

data.title: Senior Program Manager - Enterprise Delivery Middle East
data.raw_snippet:
Job description:
   

  


 Denodo is seeking a seasoned Senior Program Manager – Enterprise Delivery to lead the execution of complex, high\-impact data management programs for strategic enterprise clients. This role is pivotal in ensuring the successful adoption of Denodo’s platform at scale, driv
data.jd_text:
Job description:
   

  


 Denodo is seeking a seasoned Senior Program Manager – Enterprise Delivery to lead the execution of complex, high\-impact data management programs for strategic enterprise clients. This role is pivotal in ensuring the successful adoption of Denodo’s platform at scale, driving measurable business outcomes, and fostering long\-term customer success.
   

 You will oversee the orchestration of multi\-stream programs, manage cross\-functional delivery teams, and serve as a trusted advisor to executive stakeholders. This is a high\-visibility role requiring strategic thinking, operational excellence, and a deep understanding of enterprise data ecosystems.
 



  

**Key Responsibilities** 



* Serve as the senior delivery leader and primary point of contact for enterprise\-scale engagements.
* Lead the planning, execution, and governance of complex programs involving data virtualization, integration, analytics, and governance.
* Develop and maintain program roadmaps, aligning delivery milestones with customer business objectives.
* Manage program risks, dependencies, and stakeholder expectations across internal and external teams.
* Drive continuous improvement in delivery methodologies, tools, and processes.
* Collaborate with product, engineering, and partner teams to co\-innovate and deliver tailored solutions.
* Build and maintain strong executive relationships with customers and partners to ensure long\-term success and referenceability.



**Required Qualifications** 



* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Engineering, or a related field.
* Minimum of 10 years of experience managing complex, multi\-million\-dollar enterprise programs in data management, cloud, or digital transformation domains.
* Proven experience leading cross\-functional teams across geographies and time zones.
* Strong understanding of data integration, data virtualization, analytics, and enterprise architecture.
* Demonstrated success in delivering programs using methodologies such as PMI\-PMP, SAFe, Agile, or PRINCE2\.
* Exceptional communication, stakeholder management, and executive reporting skills.
* Experience working with global system integrators (GSIs), independent software vendors (ISVs), and large enterprise customers.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* PMI\-PMP certification (required).
* Experience with hybrid/multi\-cloud data architectures and modern data platforms.
* Familiarity with Denodo or similar data virtualization platforms is a plus.
* Ability to influence without authority and drive alignment across diverse teams.
* Fluency in English is required; fluency in Arabic is a strong asset, especially for engagements in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region.

data.title: PROJECT ENGINEERING MANAGER
data.raw_snippet:
**Key Responsibilities**
* Coordinate with Project Planning Manager and ensure deliveries are aligned to Project Schedule
* Conduct regular project review meetings and ensure adherence to schedule
* Conduct internal review meetings for resource optimization, allocation and enhance productivity
* Rev
data.jd_text:
**Key Responsibilities**
* Coordinate with Project Planning Manager and ensure deliveries are aligned to Project Schedule
* Conduct regular project review meetings and ensure adherence to schedule
* Conduct internal review meetings for resource optimization, allocation and enhance productivity
* Review of designs, calculations \& drawings and ensure their timely submissions after obtaining approvals from customer
* Clarification of issues w.r.t. vendors and ensuring timely delivery of materials at project site
* Capable of Multitasking and deliver multiple things on time
* Clarification to inter – discipline Managers for sorting out issues w.r.t. design aspects of the equipment
* Enable \& review accurate estimation in terms of quantity for submission of Bill of Materials
* Review critical issues and procedural delays w.r.t. design aspects of equipment and extend support to Site Execution teams
* Ensure BIM implementation in the projects
* Settle procurement issues and extend support to Supply Chain management for ensuring order finalization for Vendor Engineering
* Extend support for BOQ, review of pre\-bid offers and technical submissions \& provide post\-tender clarifications (after clarification from vendors) to the contracts team
* Lead and manage team of Design Leads, Design Engineers and Draughts persons
* Review Vendor evaluation (w.r.t. technical specification requirement of the client)
* Extend support to Site Execution Teams for commercial issues \& processing of bills
* Ensure issuance of Manufacturing Clearance by undertaking and facilitating necessary communication with suppliers
* Communicate \& clarify deliverable list from the client and obtaining resource requirement for project


 Technical Expertise: The Project Engineering Manager shall have overall expertise in both primary engineering \& secondary engineering for substation projects. The Manager is required to have thorough understanding in design aspects of GIS / AIS Substations up to 765 KV.
   

  

 She / He is required to be proficient in selection of equipment such as Power Transformers, Reactors, Circuit Breakers, Disconnectors, Instrument Transformer. He shall be well versed in Substation Primary and Secondary Design including Earthing, Lighting, Lightning Protection, Cabling etc., interfaces between Civil, MEP \& Instrumentation and Secondary engineering activities like Schemes, Wiring Diagrams, SCADA \& Control System.
   

  

 The PEM is required to have understanding of leading and execution of projects for different geographies / clients / utilities. She / he should have detailed knowledge of the equipment to be installed and the market conditions for vendor engineering.
   

  

 The PEM is required to understand and interpret the contractual technical requirements and facilitate the Project Teams as and when required. The PEM shall have good interviewing skills.

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
Assystem is an international company with one mission: accelerate the energy transition around the world.
   

  

 Every day, our 6,500 switchers located in 12 countries (Europe, Middle East, Pacific Asia \& Africa) connect their six thousand billion neurons to tackle the task of the century: switc
data.jd_text:
Assystem is an international company with one mission: accelerate the energy transition around the world.
   

  

 Every day, our 6,500 switchers located in 12 countries (Europe, Middle East, Pacific Asia \& Africa) connect their six thousand billion neurons to tackle the task of the century: switching to low\-carbon energy.
   

  

 We are a collective committed to the actors who are making the energy switch. Sharing our knowledge, expertise and values allows us to innovate and think differently about the energy transition.
   

  

 Drawing on more than 55 years' experience in highly regulated sectors subject to strict security and safety requirements, we provide our customers with engineering and project management services, as well as digital services and solutions to optimize the performance of complex infrastructure projects throughout their life cycle. The Group is currently ranked second in the world for nuclear engineering.
   

  

 To ensure a viable, efficient, and reliable energy future for all
   

  

**Job Description**
* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of digital projects
* Define project scope, objectives, and deliverables
* Develop project plans, schedules, and budgets
* Manage project risks, issues, and change requests
* Coordinate with cross\-functional teams and stakeholders
* Ensure timely delivery and quality of project outcomes
* Monitor project performance and provide regular reports
* Manage client expectations and communication
* Oversee vendor and contractor performance
* Drive continuous improvement and digital innovation initiatives


**Qualifications**
* Ensure compliance with Quality Management System
* Maintain proper project documentation and reporting
* Promote continuous improvement practices


**Additional Information**
 We are committed to equal treatment of candidates and promote, as well as foster all forms of diversity within our company. We believe that bringing together people with different backgrounds and perspectives is essential for creating innovative and impactful solutions. Skills, talent, and our people’s ability to dare are the only things that matter !. Bring your unique contributions and help us shape the future.

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet: *Certified as a Top Employer; KONE is dedicated to a better world of work and exhibits this through excellent people practices. We are committed to fostering a great work culture and inspiring the highest standards of quality and efficiency putting our people first and creating a workplace that nurt
data.jd_text:
*Certified as a Top Employer; KONE is dedicated to a better world of work and exhibits this through excellent people practices. We are committed to fostering a great work culture and inspiring the highest standards of quality and efficiency putting our people first and creating a workplace that nurtures collaboration, diversity, growth and wellbeing.*
***It's time to make a move. Join our flow.***
 We are seeking a Project Manager who will be responsible for managing the scope, schedule, and budget of assigned projects. The Project Manager will oversee coordination with all key stakeholders, both internal and external, with a strong emphasis on maintaining proactive and continuous collaboration with the customer.
   

  

 In this role, the Project Manager will plan, direct, and coordinate project activities to ensure that objectives are achieved within the agreed timeline and budget, using approved KONE methodologies and tools.
   

  

 The primary objectives of the Project Manager role are to ensure customer satisfaction and support KONE’s profitability.
   

  

***What will you do?***
* Accountable for project scope, schedule and budget, delivering the project within the defined contractual requirements and KONE objectives.
* Ensure KONE business success and customer satisfaction.
* Ensure professional stakeholder management.
* Accountable for proactively managing customer communication throughout the project
* Ensure integrated project planning and management with customers and KONE full chain teams!
* Managing project deliverables in line with project plan.
* Ensure continuous full chain project monitoring and control.
* Responsible for successful project start\-up, project reviews, project reporting and facilitating project governance.
* Ensure that project status and progress is effectively communicated to KONE management and to customer.
* Responsible for operational and financial project risk identification, mitigation, contingency planning, and potential recovery actions
* Accountable for the project’s financial planning and forecasting, cash flow management and revenue management (capitalizing on change order opportunities)
* Responsible for actively driving Sales\-to\-Operations handover quality, accountable for handovers to Customer and Maintenance as well as project closing activities.
* Maintain master action log and lessons learned document.
* Plans and ensures sufficient project resourcing and competences.
* Manages and leads the full chain project team.
* Creates and maintains safety and security awareness amongst employees and subcontractors in the project. Ensures following of KONE's and Customer’s safety and security policies.


***Are you the one?***
* Bachelor degree in Engineering.
* Minimum of 5 years’ experience in a Project Management role.
* Proven experience in the elevator and escalator industry.
* Fluency in Arabic is essential.
* Excellent command of the English language.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
* Demonstrated negotiation skills with a proactive, results\-driven approach.


*At KONE, we are focused on creating an innovative and collaborative working culture where we value the contribution of each individual. Employee engagement is a key focus area for us and we encourage participation and the sharing of information and ideas. Sustainability is an integral part of our culture and the daily practice. We follow ethical business practices and we seek to develop a culture of working together where co\-workers trust and respect each other and good performance is recognized. In being a great place to work, we are proud to offer a range of experiences and opportunities that will help you to achieve your career and personal goals and enable you to live a healthy and balanced life.*
 Read more on
 *https://careers.kone.com/en/*

data.title: Senior Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
This role requires a proven track record in managing complex, mission\-critical infrastructure projects from inception through commissioning, with specific expertise in data centre environments and their unique technical requirements.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Lead end\-to\-end deliv
data.jd_text:
This role requires a proven track record in managing complex, mission\-critical infrastructure projects from inception through commissioning, with specific expertise in data centre environments and their unique technical requirements.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of greenfield data centre projects from design development through construction completion and commissioning
* Manage all aspects of project execution including scope, schedule, budget, quality, and risk management
* Serve as the primary client interface and single point of accountability for project success
* Coordinate multidisciplinary project teams including architects, engineers, contractors, and specialty consultants
* Provide expert oversight of critical technical systems including high\-density power distribution and redundant electrical infrastructure
* Manage stormwater management systems and site drainage solutions to ensure environmental and regulatory compliance
* Coordinate integration of mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) systems with data centre operational requirements
* Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, design teams, contractors, regulatory authorities, and stakeholders
* Lead project meetings, prepare comprehensive progress reports, and communicate project status to senior leadership
* Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks throughout the project lifecycle
* Implement quality assurance protocols to ensure construction meets data centre industry standards
* Ensure compliance with all applicable building codes, safety regulations, and industry best practices


**Required Skills \& Experience**
* Minimum 8\-10 years of project management experience in commercial construction
* At least 5 years specifically managing data centre projects
* Demonstrated success delivering greenfield data centre facilities from site development through operational readiness
* Deep understanding of data centre design principles, infrastructure requirements, and operational considerations
* Expertise in managing stormwater management and site drainage systems for large\-scale developments
* Strong knowledge of electrical systems, power distribution, and redundancy requirements for mission\-critical facilities
* Familiarity with AI industry requirements including high\-density computing infrastructure and enhanced cooling systems
* Proven experience managing projects with budgets exceeding $50M
* Strong leadership capabilities with ability to manage large, diverse project teams
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with ability to influence stakeholders at all levels
* Strategic problem\-solving ability with focus on practical, cost\-effective solutions
* Proficiency in project management software including MS Project, Primavera P6, and construction management platforms
* Strong commercial acumen with understanding of contract administration and change management processes


**Academic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Construction Management, Engineering, or related field (required)
* PMP certification
* LEED AP or similar sustainability credential (advantageous)

data.title: Retail Project Manager - KSA
data.raw_snippet:
**What Will Be Your Mission**
 We are looking for a dynamic and structured Retail Project Manager to join the Cartier KSA team based in Riyadh and reporting to the Area Sales Manager. This role is dedicated to support commercial performance and drive boutique network development by leading strategic
data.jd_text:
**What Will Be Your Mission**
 We are looking for a dynamic and structured Retail Project Manager to join the Cartier KSA team based in Riyadh and reporting to the Area Sales Manager. This role is dedicated to support commercial performance and drive boutique network development by leading strategic projects and provide high\-level coordination and reporting.
   

  

 The role serves as a critical bridge between executive leadership, cross\-functional teams, and day\-to\-day retail activities.
   

  

**HOW WILL YOU MAKE AN IMPACT?**
**Special Projects Management**
* Work hand\-in\-hand with Commercial leadership on the development and execution of detailed projects and workshops related to key priorities.
* Create and execute strategies aligned with business objectives such as Sales Growth or Store Expansions.
* Lead the end\-to\-end orchestration of new boutique openings, directing cross\-functional teams (including Merchandising, Marketing, Supply Chain, and Operations) to align on timelines, budgets, and brand standards.
* Lead projects to improve Boutique flows and the way we operate boutiques. (ie. Floor Management) hand in hand with Area Sales Manager and L\&D.
* Manage special initiatives, boutique openings/closings, boutique briefs, network committee preparations, and related projects.


**Network Development \& Real Estate Management**
* Oversee real estate aspects including leases follow\-up and contract review in collaboration with local and regional teams.


**Daily Coordination: Day\-to\-Day Support to Area Sales Manager and Boutiques**
* Deliver regular updates, project dashboards, and briefing materials to executive stakeholders in both Cartier and Richemont.
* Develop and deliver high\-quality PowerPoint presentations and executive\-level communication materials that clearly articulate project goals, insights, and business recommendations.
* Transform complex business information into compelling visual stories to support decision\-making at both local and regional levels.
* Facilitate Retail meetings, workshops, and cross\-functional working groups with strong narrative structure and clear outcome orientation.
* Prepare materials and minutes for monthly Retail Leadership meetings.
* Assist the Area Sales Manager with ad\-hoc tasks, coordinating initiatives, and ensuring boutique managers receive the guidance and resources needed to meet business goals.
* Prepare presentations in assistance with the Area Sales Manager or other managers.
* Coordinate Retail Meetings and Events.


**Performance Reporting and Boutique Action Plan Execution Monitoring (KPIs, Elevation)**
* Ensure the implementation of the Match to Traffic (MTT) schedule mindset in boutiques in partnership with Commercial leadership team.
* Conduct MTT Weekly Analysis on coverage per boutique and provide feedback to Area Sales Manager.
* Perform Retail Team Productivity Monitoring, supporting the Area Sales Manager in making decisions to steer performance (e.g., FTE moves between boutiques).
* Support on Target Setting implementation ensuring monthly consolidations within deadlines set, and monthly reporting of Retail team performance vs. Commercial targets.
* Follow up, review and report to the Area Sales Manager on Boutique Monthly reports (e.g., team performance touch base, boutique performance rituals and action plan, consignments, gratuities and discounts if any).
* Consolidate commercial, marketing, and finance data to produce regular business reviews to the Area Sales Manager.


**What We Are Looking For**
* Minimum Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in related discipline
* Minimum of 5 years of experience in project management and/or commercial support roles
* Proven track record in luxury boutique network management, including involvement in new store openings, renovations or relocations.
* Hands on experience in performance monitoring and productivity improvement.
* Demonstrated ability to lead cross\-functional projects.
* Entrepreneurial mindset and business acumen
* Excellent analytical skills and understanding of retail productivity levers
* Excellent interpersonal skills to handle both internal and external stakeholders (staff, partners, clients and colleagues)
* Ability to credibly represent the Maison and its core values
* Strategic thinking \& problem solving.
* Facilitation \& workshop leadership
* Real Estate \& Contract coordination
* Executive communication and presentation
* Solid digital skills and interest in new technologies and media
* Knowledge of the watch \& jewelry industry is a plus
* International experience is a plus
* Fluency in English and Arabic is a Plus


**What Do We Offer**
 At Cartier, we are proud to employ talents from diverse backgrounds, experiences, and identities. We believe that when diversity and inclusion are fully embraced and empowered, creativity and knowledge emerge to deliver excellence. We continue to work towards creating a workforce that represents the diversity of our clients and our communities.
   

  

 We offer a dynamic work environment where expertise meets Arts and Culture. We are fully transparent and share with you: Maison strategies, key information, needs of others Corporate Departments.
   

  

 We constantly educate you with: Cartier’s savoir\-faire, competitive landscape, industry news, client experience best practices. We facilitate career development and evolution in the mid\-term within our Maison.
   

  

 We develop you with training, continuous learning and encourage a healthy and strong feedback culture, where you will feel encouraged and able to give an honest opinion, as this is essential to us.
   

  

**WHO WE ARE?**
 As a place where singularity thrives together, we value the uniqueness of our people, and we see the results of what we do because we are on the journey together. We recognize the richness diversity brings and we embrace a workplace where those differences can be leveraged.
   

  

 We offer exciting opportunities to gain experience professionally and personally in a supportive environment which in turn inspires the Cartier creations that become icons in the world of luxury.
   

  

 We respect and celebrate the diversity of our people, their backgrounds and experiences and provide equal opportunity for all. We believe that when diversity and inclusion are fully embraced and empowered, creativity and knowledge emerge to deliver excellence. We continue to work towards creating a workforce that represents the diversity of our clients and our communities.
   

  

 Quite simply, Cartier is a place like no other. Welcome to our Maison!

data.title: Construction Project Manager (Civil Infrastructure)
data.raw_snippet: JASARA PMC is seeking a highly skilled Construction Project Manager with onsite construction experience specializing in Civil Infrastructure to lead and oversee infrastructure projects. In this role, you will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and managing all aspects of civil infrastructure
data.jd_text:
JASARA PMC is seeking a highly skilled Construction Project Manager with onsite construction experience specializing in Civil Infrastructure to lead and oversee infrastructure projects. In this role, you will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and managing all aspects of civil infrastructure construction to ensure projects meet quality, safety, budget, and schedule requirements. You will collaborate closely with engineering teams, contractors, and stakeholders to successfully deliver complex infrastructure developments.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Manage the planning, design review, and construction phases of civil infrastructure projects including roads, utilities, drainage, and related facilities
* Develop and maintain project schedules, budgets, and resource plans
* Coordinate and manage subcontractors, suppliers, and construction crews to ensure efficient project execution
* Ensure strict compliance with safety standards, local regulations, and environmental requirements
* Conduct regular site inspections and progress meetings to monitor project performance
* Identify and mitigate project risks and resolve issues promptly
* Prepare detailed reports and documentation for stakeholders and clients


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field
* Minimum 10 years of experience managing civil infrastructure construction projects
* Strong knowledge of civil engineering principles, construction techniques, and infrastructure design
* Proven track record of delivering large\-scale infrastructure projects on time and within budget
* Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills
* Proficient in project management software and tools
* Ability to work effectively in multidisciplinary and multicultural environments
* Strong problem\-solving skills and attention to detail

data.title: Game Jam Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description** 








 GCON is a dynamic community committed to supporting women in the video game industry. Our team focuses on empowering women in various fields such as game development, esports, and creative storytelling. GCON organizes workshops, conventions, and exhibitions featurin
data.jd_text:
**Company Description** 








 GCON is a dynamic community committed to supporting women in the video game industry. Our team focuses on empowering women in various fields such as game development, esports, and creative storytelling. GCON organizes workshops, conventions, and exhibitions featuring international video game companies, independent studios, and local indie developers. The organization also hosts engaging talks, tournaments, and competitions, creating a platform for learning, networking, and showcasing talent.
 



  





**Role Description** 








 GCON is seeking a Project Manager to lead the end\-to\-end planning and delivery of a global women\-focused game jam. The role requires strong ownership across planning, execution, and stakeholder coordination, team management to ensure a high\-quality, seamless experience for participants across multiple locations.
 



 The Project Manager will be responsible for fully managing event planning and operations, while maintaining alignment with GCON’s objectives and standards.
 



  





  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  




* Develop and manage the overall project plan, timeline, and key milestones across the full game jam lifecycle
* Oversee execution across global locations (online and on\-site chapters)
* Track progress, identify risks, and implement mitigation plans
* develop delgation and responsibilites plan for the team you’ll manage
* Coordinate with international partners, local organizers, and sponsors
* Act as the main point of contact for all operational stakeholders
* Ensure alignment across all parties on deliverables, timelines, and expectations
* Game Jam Operations
* Oversee participant journey (registration, onboarding, team formation, submission process)
* Coordinate workshops, mentorship sessions, and judging process
* Ensure consistency in experience across all locations
* Lead planning and execution of the final ceremony in Riyadh
* Coordinate on\-ground logistics including run of show, participant management, and partner requirements
* Work closely with production teams to ensure smooth delivery
* Ensure all outputs (communications, workshops, judging criteria, deliverables) meet GCON and parnter standards
* Maintain consistency in branding, tone, and participant experience
* Provide regular progress updates to internal leadership
* Track KPIs, participation metrics, and post\-event reporting
* Document learnings and recommendations for future editions



  





  





  





**Qualifications** 




  




* Proven experience managing game jams, gaming events, or similar global programs.
* Strong understanding of game development pipelines and community dynamics.
* Experience working with international teams and managing multi\-location initiatives.
* Strong organizational, communication, and problem\-solving skills.

data.raw_snippet:
Mace combines construction expertise with consultancy to unlock potential in every person or project and redefine the boundaries of ambition. Our values shape the way we consult and define the people we want to join us on our journey.
   

  

**The Project**
 This is an opportunity to work on one o
data.jd_text:
Mace combines construction expertise with consultancy to unlock potential in every person or project and redefine the boundaries of ambition. Our values shape the way we consult and define the people we want to join us on our journey.
   

  

**The Project**
 This is an opportunity to work on one of the largest programmes in Saudi Arabia. This unique project consists of major mixed\-use development including sports facilities, entertainment, and arts along with all associated infrastructure.
   

  

 Mace is seeking an experienced Associate Director – MEP to join our team on a major international sports complex development. Acting in the role of Engineer, the position is accountable for leading the MEP design management, technical assurance, and compliance across the programme, ensuring safe, efficient, and fully coordinated MEP solutions from concept through delivery.
   

  

 The role will work closely with multidisciplinary engineering teams, specialist designers, and construction stakeholders to ensure the MEP systems meet performance, quality, sustainability, and operational requirements expected of a world class sporting venue.
   

  

**You’ll Be Responsible For**
* Lead and manage all MEP engineering and design management activities in the Engineer role across the project lifecycle.
* Provide technical leadership and governance for MEP disciplines, ensuring alignment with international standards, statutory requirements, and best practice.
* Manage the review, coordination, and approval of MEP design submissions, calculations, specifications, and technical reports.
* Oversee interface management between architectural, structural, and MEP disciplines to ensure fully integrated design solutions.
* Chair and contribute to technical workshops, design reviews, and coordination meetings.
* Support value engineering, buildability, and whole life performance optimisation of MEP systems.
* Provide guidance on energy efficiency, sustainability, low carbon design, and operational resilience suitable for a large scale sports venue.
* Manage and mentor MEP engineers and design managers, fostering high performance and technical excellence.
* Support procurement and tender activities, including technical evaluations of specialist contractors and suppliers.
* Monitor construction\-stage activities including technical queries, inspections, testing, commissioning, and handover support.
* Ensure robust technical risk management, change control, and quality assurance processes are applied throughout delivery.


**You’ll Need To Have**
* Proven experience in a senior MEP design management or engineering leadership role on large, complex developments.
* Strong background working in an Engineer, Consultant, or Design Authority role.
* Experience on sports, stadiums, arenas, or complex public assembly projects is strongly preferred.
* Demonstrated capability across the full project lifecycle, from early design through construction and handover.
* Excellent understanding of international MEP design standards, codes, and regulations.
* Strong stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence multidisciplinary teams.
* Experience working in the Middle East and with fast\-paced, high\-profile programmes is advantageous.
* Necessary visa criteria for the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and have relevant work experience working on high\-valued projects/programmes for a project management consultancy business, which are required for immigration and client approval.


**Our values**
**Safety first \- Going home safe and well:** 
 We champion a safe, diverse, and inclusive working environment, understanding the importance of well\-being in every team.
   

  

**Client focus \- Deliver on our promise:** 
 We own the quality of deliverables and strategic outcomes and build long\-term relationships with our clients.
   

  

**Integrity \- Always do the right thing:** 
 We influence positive outcomes within our industry while always aligning with our compliance obligations.
   

  

**Create opportunity \- For our people to excel:** 
 We champion a continuous improvement culture throughout all activities, inspiring our people and teams to develop.
   

  

 Mace is an inclusive employer and welcomes interest from a diverse range of candidates. Even if you feel you do not fulfill all the criteria, please apply, as you may still be the best candidate for this role or another role within our organisation.
   

  

 We are also open to discussing part\-time, flexible, and hybrid working options if suitable within the role.

data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose:**
 Qiddiya Investment Company is excited to announce an opportunity for a highly skilled and visionary leader to join our team as the
 **Executive Director \- Business Finance (SPT \& Art \& Culture)** 
 . This critical role is responsible for overseeing financial operations that supp
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose:**
 Qiddiya Investment Company is excited to announce an opportunity for a highly skilled and visionary leader to join our team as the
 **Executive Director \- Business Finance (SPT \& Art \& Culture)** 
 . This critical role is responsible for overseeing financial operations that support our diverse initiatives in sports, performing arts, and culture, as we aim to develop an iconic destination that inspires creativity and recreational excellence.
   

  

 The Executive Director will provide strategic financial leadership, guiding financial decision\-making, budgeting, forecasting, and analytics critical to project growth and sustainability. You will collaborate closely with senior management and cross\-functional teams to foster financial best practices, optimize resource allocation, and drive performance across our business finance landscape.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Strategic Financial Leadership:
* Lead financial planning and strategic analysis for sports, performing arts, and cultural initiatives, ensuring alignment with Qiddiya's vision and goals
* Develop and implement business finance strategies that effectively support operational needs while maximizing ROI across diverse projects
* Act as a trusted financial advisor to the executive team, offering insights and recommendations based on rigorous financial analysis
* Budget Management \& Oversight:
* Direct budgeting processes for the sports and arts portfolio, ensuring effective allocation of financial resources to achieve company objectives
* Implement fiscal controls and performance metrics that provide actionable insights into financial health and operational efficiency
* Monitor financial performance against budgets, providing timely variance analysis and reporting to senior management
* Financial Reporting \& Compliance:
* Oversee the preparation and presentation of financial reports, ensuring accuracy and compliance with relevant financial regulations and standards
* Implement best practices in financial governance, ensuring adherence to internal policies and external regulations
* Coordinate with auditors and provide necessary documentation for financial audits and assessments
* Risk Assessment \& Mitigation:
* Identify and analyze financial risks related to business finance in arts, culture, and sports, formulating strategies to mitigate these risks
* Develop and implement risk management policies to protect organizational assets and ensure financial integrity
* Collaborate with legal and compliance teams to ensure full adherence to applicable laws and regulations
* Team Leadership \& Development:
* Lead a team of finance professionals, fostering a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous improvement
* Set clear objectives and performance benchmarks for the team, ensuring alignment with organizational goals
* Encourage professional growth and development through mentoring, training, and leadership opportunities
* Stakeholder Engagement:
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with internal and external stakeholders, including government entities, partners, and community organizations
* Communicate financial strategies and results clearly to diverse audiences, ensuring transparency and understanding
* Support stakeholder engagement initiatives that promote collaboration and strategic partnerships for project success


**Requirements**
**Qualifications \& Skills:**
* Education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or related field; MBA or other relevant advanced degree preferred
* Certifications: CPA, CFA, or equivalent relevant certification greatly beneficial
* Experience: Minimum of 15 years in senior finance roles, with a focus on business finance within the sports, arts, and culture sectors
* Expertise: Proven experience in financial management, budgeting, financial analysis, and reporting, with knowledge of the unique finance needs of the arts and culture sectors
* Strategic Acumen: Ability to develop long\-term financial strategies that align with organizational missions and operational goals
* Leadership: Strong leadership qualities, with demonstrated experience in building and guiding high\-performance finance teams
* Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, capable of engaging and influencing a wide range of stakeholders
* Technological Proficiency: Familiarity with financial software, ERP systems, and data analysis tools relevant to financial reporting and analysis


**Required Competencies:**
* Strategic Orientation: Ability to align financial strategies with broader organizational goals
* Analytical Mindset: Strong analytical capabilities with attention to detail in financial documents and budgetary management
* Collaborative Approach: Proven ability to collaborate across teams and departments for cohesive financial strategy implementation
* Innovative Thinking: Enthusiasm for innovative financial solutions that support creative projects and initiatives
* Results Focus: Demonstrated track record of delivering results and achieving financial targets in complex environments


**Benefits**
 Offering a comprehensive compensation and benefits package.

data.title: Executive Director - Development (Sports) - SPA180
data.raw_snippet: Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking an Executive Director \- Development to take a leadership role in delivering this critical residential and sports development project. This role is essential in ensuring the successful planning, design, and construction of a world\-class sports precinct that ali
data.jd_text:
Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking an Executive Director \- Development to take a leadership role in delivering this critical residential and sports development project. This role is essential in ensuring the successful planning, design, and construction of a world\-class sports precinct that aligns with Qiddiya's visionary goals for community living and international sporting events.
   

  

 As the Executive Director \- Development, you will oversee the entire development process, managing cross\-functional teams and collaborating closely with stakeholders to deliver a high\-quality, sustainable, and timely project. Your expertise will contribute to creating a vibrant, functional, and inspiring living environment for athletes and future residents.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead the strategic planning and execution of the mega\-sporting events development, ensuring adherence to scope, quality, budget, and schedule
* Manage multidisciplinary teams, including design, construction, and operations professionals, to drive project delivery
* Collaborate with internal and external stakeholders, including government authorities, contractors, and community organizations
* Ensure the implementation of sustainable and innovative design solutions conducive to a high\-quality residential environment
* Oversee risk management and compliance with all regulatory and safety standards throughout the project lifecycle
* Monitor project progress and performance, providing regular updates to senior management and adjusting plans as necessary
* Promote a culture of excellence, safety, and continuous improvement among project teams
* Facilitate effective communication and coordination between various project stakeholders


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Architecture, Civil Engineering, Real Estate Development, or related field; Master's degree preferred
* At least 25 years of progressive experience in large\-scale residential development projects, preferably in athlete or sports\-related village infrastructure
* Proven track record in managing multidisciplinary teams and successfully delivering complex projects on time and within budget
* Strong knowledge of sustainable development practices and residential project standards
* Excellent leadership, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills
* Experience working with government agencies and regulatory bodies
* Proficiency in project management tools, methodologies, and best practices
* Fluency in English; Arabic language skills are an advantage

data.jd_text:
Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking a highly skilled and experienced Executive Director for Development of Sports Competition \& Event Venues. This leadership role is critical to the successful planning, design, development and execution of world\-class sports and event venues within the Qiddiya entertainment city, aimed at fostering a dynamic and vibrant sports ecosystem.
   

  

 The Executive Director will oversee all aspects of development for sports competition and event venues, ensuring projects are delivered on time, within budget, and meet international standards. You will collaborate with multidisciplinary teams and external stakeholders to drive innovation and operational excellence across venue planning, construction, and activation.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead the strategic development, planning, and execution of sports competition and event venues within Qiddiya
* Oversee project delivery including design, construction, commissioning, and integration with broader destination elements
* Work closely with architects, engineers, contractors, and sports governing bodies to ensure venues meet functional and regulatory requirements
* Manage budgets, timelines, and resources effectively to deliver high\-quality venues
* Ensure compliance with international sports standards and best practices, promoting safety and accessibility
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders, including sports federations, event organizers, and government entities
* Drive innovation in venue design and operations to enhance fan experience and operational efficiency
* Provide leadership to project teams, fostering collaboration and ensuring alignment with corporate goals
* Report regularly to senior management on project progress, risks, and opportunities


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering, Architecture, Sports Management, or a related field (Master's degree preferred)
* At least 20\-25 years of experience in sports venue development, construction management, or related project leadership roles
* Proven track record in delivering large\-scale sports competition venues on time and within budget
* Strong knowledge of international sports standards, regulations, and best practices
* Excellent leadership and team management skills with the ability to manage multidisciplinary teams
* Exceptional project management capabilities including budgeting, scheduling, and risk management
* Strong communication and stakeholder engagement skills
* Ability to work effectively in a fast\-paced and dynamic environment
* Experience working with sports federations, event organizers, and governmental agencies is highly desirable

data.jd_text:
**Position\- MEP Project Manager**
**Location\- Riyadh\- Saudi Arabia**
**Role:**
 The Project Manager is responsible for delivering and leading the assigned project. This includes review of handover documentation from Tender Team, Project Kick\-off, planning, executing, controlling, monitoring and closing out the project, while managing risks, opportunities, commercial management, timelines, resources and the entire scope of the project. The Project Manager is required to act as the primary focal point of contact between JEG Senior Management, the Client, Consultants and the JEG Project Delivery Team ensuring the desired project objectives are delivered meeting all set project objectives
   

  

**Project Roles And Responsibilities**
* Direct line of report Regional Projects Director
* Critique tender documentation / Pre\-Construction project handover documentation, identify project risks and opportunities with Project Leads
* Manages the expectations of project leadership and stakeholders throughout the project.
* Ensures all departments are complying with all standard JEG SOP’s
* Responsible for managing the execution of all project milestones/deliverables. Establish and monitor program and project controls KPI's.
* Acts as a primary day to day liaison to the client project leadership teams and project execution partners.
* Identifies and resolve disputes quickly and reasonably with Project Stakeholders.
* Develops and maintains a comprehensive project plan, in keeping with the size and complexity as mutually agreed upon by the JEG organization SOP and the Project Director.
* Provides leadership and actively manages the project team resources within the confines of the project, identifying any deficiencies to the Project Director.
* Ensure that the health and safety requirements are provided in coordination with HSE Manager and that they comply with JEG HSE requirements and authorities’ regulations. Ensure regular audits are carried out for EHS compliance and any remedial actions are implemented in coordination with the HSE Manager.
* Manages detailed project planning documentation in conjunction with the Project Controls Engineer (Execution Plans, Risk Mgmt. Log, Status Reports, Schedule Reports, Progress Reports), these reports shall be prepared in accordance with Regional JEG Standardized Reporting Template formats.
* Manages detailed Project Budget Reports detailing Preliminaries, Procurement, indirect and direct staff, Subcontractors and overheads / Cost forecasts in conjunction with the QS / Project Controls Engineer with consultation of Project Director and Commercial Director
* Actively manages, communicates and mitigates project risks and issues and escalates when necessary


**Experience \& Qualifications**
* Time served apprenticeship an advantage.
* Minimum 10 years work experience on construction projects / Minimum 3 years as a Project Manager
* Qualifications commensurate with position:
* Role applicable degree from a reputed university / Trade Qualifications NVQ, etc.
* Experience in Data Centre Projects.
* Competent in the use of PC applications (Microsoft Office suit or equivalent)
* MEP background

 The Project Director is responsible for the overall leadership and delivery of large\-scale data centre projects in Saudi Arabia within a general contracting environment. The role has full accountability for project performance, including safety, programme, cost, quality, and commer
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
 The Project Director is responsible for the overall leadership and delivery of large\-scale data centre projects in Saudi Arabia within a general contracting environment. The role has full accountability for project performance, including safety, programme, cost, quality, and commercial outcomes, ensuring compliance with Saudi regulations, local authority requirements, and contractual obligations. Working closely with clients, consultants, subcontractors and key stakeholders, the Project Director builds, develops and leads multidisciplinary teams to deliver mission\-critical data centre facilities to the highest standards, while managing local supply chains, Saudization requirements, and fast\-track project demands in the KSA market.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Project Leadership \& Delivery:**
* Provide end\-to\-end leadership for complex, mission\-critical data centre project from mobilisation through commissioning and handover.
* Take full responsibility for project performance, including programme, cost control, quality, safety, and risk management.
* Ensure compliance with contractual requirements, technical specifications, and regional regulations.
* Lead project governance, reporting, and decision\-making at senior and client levels.
* Appointment of individuals to key project positions.
* Work across company functional departments to engage support for on time delivery.


**Client \& Stakeholder Management:**
* Act as the primary senior point of contact for clients, consultants, subcontractors and key stakeholders.
* Build and maintain strong client relationships, ensuring confidence in delivery and responsiveness.
* Manage client expectations and lead negotiations on variations, claims, and commercial matters.


**Commercial \& Contractual Oversight:**
* Oversee commercial strategy in collaboration with commercial team.
* Ensure effective cost control, forecasting, and cash flow management.
* Review and approve major subcontract packages, procurement strategies, and commercial decisions.
* Manage risk, claims, and dispute avoidance/resolution.


**Team \& Resource Management:**
* Build, Lead, mentor, and develop project management, engineering, construction, and support teams.
* Ensure appropriate resourcing, capability, and succession planning for project delivery.
* Promote a strong culture of safety, accountability, and performance excellence.


**Programme, Quality \& Safety:**
* Ensure robust planning and programme controls are in place to meet critical data centre milestones.
* Drive best\-in\-class quality assurance and control processes aligned with data centre standards.
* Champion health, safety, and environmental excellence across all project activities.


**Pre\-Construction \& Business Support:**
* Support pre\-construction, tendering, and bid teams with construction methodology, programme input, and risk reviews.
* Contribute to value engineering, buildability reviews, and logistics planning.
* Support business development efforts related to data centre opportunities where required.


**Preferred Experience \& Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or a related discipline.
* 15\+ years’ experience in construction delivery, with significant experience as a Project Director or Senior Project Manager.
* Proven track record delivering large\-scale data centre projects within a General Contracting / Main Contractor environment.
* Middle East \& Saudi Arabia experience, including knowledge of local regulations and practices.
* Demonstrated experience managing large, multi\-disciplinary teams and major subcontractors.
* Strong commercial, contractual, and risk management expertise.


**Key Competencies**
* Executive\-level project leadership
* Data centre construction expertise (mission\-critical environments)
* Client and stakeholder management
* Commercial and contractual acumen
* Programme and risk management
* Decision\-making under pressure
* Safety and quality leadership


**Personal Attributes**
* Strong leadership presence and credibility at client and executive level.
* Highly organised, decisive, and results\-driven.
* Excellent communication and negotiation skills.
* Ability to manage multi\-cultural teams.
* Ability to operate effectively in fast\-paced, high\-risk, mission\-critical environments.

data.jd_text:
Our client is a Saudi\-based enterprise services organisation supporting large corporate and government clients. The business is professionalising its sales engine to support predictable growth.
   

  

**The Role**
 The Executive Director will lead sales operations, enablement, and performance management across the commercial organisation. This role will design sales processes, CRM governance, forecasting models, and incentive structures. A key focus will be improving pipeline visibility and conversion effectiveness. The Director will work closely with sales leadership to align strategy and execution. This role will also support pricing governance and commercial analytics. High interaction with executive leadership is expected.
   

  

**Candidate Profile**
 Candidates must have senior experience in sales operations, enablement, or commercial excellence roles. Strong exposure to enterprise or B2B sales environments is essential. Experience in Saudi Arabia is highly preferred. The ideal profile demonstrates analytical strength, process discipline, and stakeholder influence. Experience working closely with frontline sales teams and leadership is required.

data.title: Project Director- Highrise
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 WSP Middle East is seeking a high\-caliber Senior Project Director to lead the successful delivery of a landmark high\-rise tower in Riyadh,KSA. The successful candidate will have an unwavering commitment to quality across every aspect of delivery — from the service we provide a
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP Middle East is seeking a high\-caliber Senior Project Director to lead the successful delivery of a landmark high\-rise tower in Riyadh,KSA. The successful candidate will have an unwavering commitment to quality across every aspect of delivery — from the service we provide and the client relationships we build, to the teams we lead and the construction works we supervise. You will be responsible for overseeing all phases of project delivery, ensuring alignment with client expectations, budget, schedule, and WSP’s commitment to excellence.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**RESPONSIBILITIES**
* Lead the delivery of a high\-rise / supertall tower project, ensuring the highest quality standards are upheld at every stage.
* Foster a strong client relationship by consistently delivering exceptional service and acting as the primary point of contact.
* Build and manage high\-performing multidisciplinary teams, ensuring collaboration and accountability.
* Ensure assigned projects are completed within budget and schedule, while meeting client requirements and business objectives.
* Oversee all aspects of project execution, including design management, construction supervision, cost control, and stakeholder engagement.
* Provide strategic leadership and guidance throughout the full project lifecycle.
* Drive innovation, sustainability, and digital best practices in project delivery.
* Represent WSP at senior\-level meetings and within broader industry forums as required.


**Qualifications/Experience**
**QUALIFICATIONS**
* A degree in a discipline suited to the work to be delivered, with the ability to converse in technical matters across all disciplines associated with our Construction Supervision projects.
* 20\+ years’ experience in leading construction supervision of multi\-disciplinary projects.
* Working for an international consultancy for 20\+ years and over 5 years of experience in the Middle East.
* Exceptional leadership and communication skills with a strong client interface presence.
* Proven experience in managing large\-scale tunnelling and hospitality projects, with a deep understanding of the technical aspects involved.
* PMP, RICS, or similar project management certification is an advantage.
* Pre\-contract design management experience under the RIBA framework (e.g., coordination during RIBA Stages 2–4, oversight of multidisciplinary design teams, value engineering, and design governance).
* High\-rise project leadership experience, clearly noting the scale (GFA, height, no. of floors) and complexity (mixed\-use, hospitality, residential, or commercial) of the developments.
* Early Contractor Involvement (ECI) delivery strategy exposure, such as constructability reviews, logistics planning, sequencing, and value engineering input at early design stages.


**Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.**
 Work on landmark projects around the world and embrace opportunities to make an even bigger impact in the communities you care about. What if you could do the best work of your life and create a legacy for yourself?
   

  

**With us, you can.** 
**Apply today.**
