We also offer selected candidates from our staff worldwide an opportunity to earn their Executive Master’s in International Education in an exclusive collaboration with King’s College London.
   

  

 Alongside great training and a competitive package, you’ll enjoy the chance to live and work in one of the world’s most vibrant countries.
   

  

 As a Nord Anglia Education teacher, you enjoy the following benefits:
   

  

* A fast\-paced, global experience so that you can progress on a global scale
* An enabling environment founded on creativity, challenge and collaboration
* A culture that is fair and consultative
* Unique opportunities to grow professionally and develop your career
* Opportunities to apply for further leadership positions


**Essential**
**EXPERIENCE / QUALIFICATIONS SOUGHT**
* University degree in Physics or Biology
* Teaching qualification (QTS,PGCE/PGDE)
* At least 6 to 9 years of teaching experience within the British curriculum
* Extensive knowledge of the English National curriculum to IGCSE


**Desirable**
* Prior middle leadership experience, for example as a Head of Subject
* Master’s degree, or other significant professional development
* Previous international experience


**PERSONAL QUALITIES SOUGHT**
* Fluent English speaker
* Values\-led approach; integrity and honesty are paramount
* Reliability, loyalty and commitment
* Personal confidence and presence
* Energetic and positive with a ‘can\-do’ approach
* Strong interpersonal skills
* Effective communication skills, both orally and in writing
* Approachable to all; able to show respect and display cultural sensitivity
* Sense of humour and grace under pressure
* Ability to understand complex issues and solve problems
* Able to manage own time and prioritise; organized
* Flexible and adaptable; able to handle uncertainty
* Able to delegate effectively


**To apply**
 Please apply for this vacancy using our recruitment portal.
   

  

 Online applications should contain a CV, a two\-page letter of application and the details of three professional references.
   

  

**Closing date for applications:** 
 30th June 2026
   

  

**Start date for this role:** 
 1st August 2026
   

  

**Selection Process**
 Applicants should submit a CV, letter of application, and the details of three professional referees, one of which should be your current Principal/Head Teacher. Interviews will be conducted at the school or via Microsoft Teams.
   

  

 Please visit us online at www.nordangliaeducation.jobs
   

  

 Please note, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
   

  

**Safeguarding**
 At Nord Anglia Education we are committed to providing a world class, safe, happy environment in which children and young people can thrive and learn. We are committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of all our pupils irrespective of race, ability, religion, gender, or culture.
   

  

 All post holders having regular unsupervised contact with children are subject to appropriate national and international vetting procedures including satisfactory criminal record checks from both your country of residence/birth and any country of residence within the last 10 years.
   

  

 We are an equal opportunities employer, and we welcome applications from all suitably qualified persons.

data.title: Associate Director - Technology Economics & Performance
data.raw_snippet:
**Our business landscape** 




  





 We’re an award\-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is gui
data.jd_text:
**Our business landscape** 




  





 We’re an award\-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is guided by five key pillars:
 



  




* **Value\-Focused Portfolio:** 
 Boosting asset returns by focusing on telco operations, towers, data centres, the sea cable business and fintech.



  




* **Strengthen the Core:** 
 Optimally using deployed capital and maintain an appropriate cost structure.



  




* **Evolve the Core:** 
 Monetising opportunities to generate new revenue streams via programmes focusing on analytics, digitalisation of operations, and partnerships with digital service providers.



  




* **People:** 
 Building an engaged and empowered workforce through integrated learning programs and coaching and mentoring.



  




* **Excellence in Customer Experience:** 
 Creating superior customer experiences.



  





 From day one, every employee who joins our team becomes an integral part of our success journey. We offer you the chance to enhance your skills, advance your career, and maintain a healthy work\-life balance. Empowering you to catapult your personal and professional growth. If you’re looking to challenge your growth potential, Ooredoo is the employer for you.
 



  





**Job overview** 




  




* Provide Group\-level expertise in Technology Planning and Performance Management across the OpCos
* The role holder maintains close contact with Technology Directors at the operating companies and works closely with other members of the technology teams to enable capital efficient network plans.



  





**Your impact on our goals** 




  




* Supports definition of Group\-wide technology evolution strategy, aligned with overall Group strategy
* Supports the review of operating company strategic plans and budgets for Technologies and assess them for alignment to the overall group strategic plan and aims, identifying any misalignment or gaps and working with the OpCo’s to achieve alignment.
* Closely collaborates with other members of the technology team to drive overall vision, strategy, technology road maps, world\-class network architectures, and enable capital efficient network plans.
* Supports the review of OpCo projects and orders ensuring alignment with Group price books, practices, architectures and roadmaps
* Supports the establishment of Group\-wide guidelines, standards, and KPIs to support Technology solutions and platform performance, capacity monitoring and dimensioning.
* Monitor SLAs and KPIs for all OpCos
* Supports the liaison with Group Strategy to review OpCo business and technology plans and align on relevant performance targets and KPIs
* Supports Group Planning \& Performance Management in performance reviews and proposing corrective measures
* Participate in the development, analysis and review of technical/cost modelling for business cases/TCO, RFI/RFQ specifications and evaluations and technical/commercial trials of relevant technologies.
* Input into the development of Group\-level Technology roadmaps and architecture best practices
* Supports the Competency Centres under the Technology Leadership Team (TLT) direction.



  





**Experience and Qualifications** 




  




* 12 years’ experience directly related to the duties and responsibilities specified
* Previously held any of the following positions or similar as a team leader or head at a major telecommunications operating company, in:
* NW and/or IT Planning,
* NW and/or IT Performance,
* Technology Investments \& Demand.
* International experience
* Experience in Ooredoo Group OPCOs is a plus.
* In\-depth working knowledge of RAN, Tx, Core Networks and/or IT and Service Delivery is mandatory
* Extensive hands\-on experience in the planning, design and implementation and operation of Technology Systems in mobile and/or fixed networks
* Extensive hands\-on experience in the planning, design and implementation and operation of NW and/or IT Performance Systems in mobile and/or fixed networks
* Vast knowledge of key mobile and/or fixed telecom NW \& IT systems, platforms, and technologies, including hardware and software components
* Strong knowledge of Telecom infrastructure technologies and end\-to\-end planning practices, implementation methods and cost optimization strategies, with a specialty in NW domains (RAN, Tx, CORE) and/or IT domains (BSS, OSS, Digital Channels)
* Knowledge and experience in systems integration techniques, system engineering, systems management,
* Current working experience with NW Technology products (Planning and Performance) from group frame vendors very desirable.
* Proven ability to translate marketing needs into engineering targets, ability to guide marketing through that process, and contribute to strategy formulation
* Proven experience with Agentic AI for automatic report generation, analysis and automation of processes is a plus
* Engineering Degree or equivalent.
* Industry training in RAN, Tx, core network platform technologies preferred
* International experience, preferably in the MENA or Asia regions.

data.title: Insurance Business Development Director
data.raw_snippet: The Insurance Business Development Director is responsible for driving the growth and strategic expansion of Estithmar Capital’s insurance portfolio. This role focuses on identifying investment opportunities, building strategic partnerships, and developing innovative insurance solutions across tradi
data.jd_text:
The Insurance Business Development Director is responsible for driving the growth and strategic expansion of Estithmar Capital’s insurance portfolio. This role focuses on identifying investment opportunities, building strategic partnerships, and developing innovative insurance solutions across traditional and digital channels.
 



 The position plays a critical role in aligning insurance initiatives with the firm’s broader investment strategy, ensuring sustainable growth, profitability, and market positioning across regional and international markets.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. Portfolio Management** 



* Oversee and manage the firm’s insurance investments, partnerships, and ventures.
* Monitor financial and operational performance of insurance\-related assets.
* Develop and execute strategies to enhance portfolio value, profitability, and scalability.
* Prepare performance reports and insights for senior management and shareholders.



**2\. Business Development \& Investments** 



* Identify and evaluate new opportunities across:
* Insurance companies
* Insurtech platforms
* Brokerage firms
* Strategic distribution partnerships
* Lead end\-to\-end deal execution including sourcing, structuring, negotiation, and closing.
* Develop new revenue streams and scalable insurance business models.



**3\. Strategic Partnerships** 



* Build and manage relationships with:
* Insurance and reinsurance companies
* Brokers and intermediaries
* Financial institutions and banks
* Structure and negotiate distribution agreements, joint ventures, and alliances.
* Represent Estithmar Capital in key industry engagements and forums.



**4\. Market \& Industry Analysis** 



* Conduct in\-depth research on regional and global insurance markets.
* Identify emerging trends and opportunities such as:
* Digital insurance / Insurtech
* Bancassurance
* Embedded insurance
* Health and life insurance segments
* Provide strategic insights to support investment decisions.



**5\. Product Development \& Distribution** 



* Collaborate with partners to design and launch innovative insurance products.
* Develop multi\-channel distribution strategies including:
* Corporate partnerships
* Digital platforms
* Financial services ecosystems
* Drive go\-to\-market strategies for new insurance offerings.



**6\. Regulatory \& Compliance Coordination** 



* Ensure all insurance\-related activities comply with applicable regulatory frameworks.
* Liaise with regulatory bodies and supervisory authorities where required.
* Monitor regulatory developments impacting insurance and financial services sectors.



**7\. Financial \& Investment Analysis** 



* Conduct financial modeling, valuation, and due diligence for insurance investments.
* Assess profitability, capital requirements, and associated risks.
* Support investment committees with data\-driven recommendations and insights.



**Qualifications \& Experience** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or related field (Master’s preferred).
* Minimum
 **12–15 years of experience** 
 in insurance, financial services, or investment management.
* Strong exposure to:
* Insurance business development
* Investment structuring and partnerships
* Insurtech / digital insurance ecosystems
* Experience within
 **investment firms, insurance groups, or financial institutions** 
 is highly preferred.
* Regional (GCC) market experience is an advantage.



**Core Competencies** 



* Strong commercial and investment acumen
* Strategic thinking with execution capability
* Advanced financial modeling and analytical skills
* High\-level negotiation and stakeholder management
* Deep understanding of insurance value chains and distribution models
* Ability to operate in a fast\-paced, multi\-asset investment environment



**Regulatory Considerations** 



* May require regulatory approval depending on the scope of insurance and investment activities.
* Must ensure compliance with applicable financial services and insurance regulations.

data.title: Project Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Project Director – Water Treatment / Desalination – Saudi Arabia** 




 I am working on behalf of a leading organisation delivering some of the Middle East’s most high\-profile water infrastructure programmes, and we are looking to engage an experienced Project Director with a proven track record
data.jd_text:
**Project Director – Water Treatment / Desalination – Saudi Arabia** 




 I am working on behalf of a leading organisation delivering some of the Middle East’s most high\-profile water infrastructure programmes, and we are looking to engage an experienced Project Director with a proven track record across large\-scale water treatment and desalination projects in Saudi Arabia.
 



  





 This is a senior leadership opportunity to take ownership of major programmes that sit at the heart of the Kingdom’s long\-term water security and infrastructure strategy.
 



  





**The Opportunity** 




 You will be responsible for the full lifecycle delivery of complex water and wastewater treatment projects, from early engineering through to commissioning and handover. These are multi\-billion SAR programmes with significant strategic importance, requiring strong leadership across multidisciplinary teams and stakeholder environments.
 



  





 You will play a critical role in driving programme performance, managing risk, and ensuring delivery against cost, schedule and quality expectations within a highly regulated and fast\-paced environment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of large\-scale water treatment / desalination projects
* Manage EPC / EPCM contractors and oversee full project execution strategy
* Drive programme governance, reporting, and performance management
* Ensure compliance with Saudi regulations, standards, and client requirements
* Lead and develop high\-performing project teams across engineering, construction, and project controls
* Manage senior stakeholder relationships across client, contractor, and government entities
* Oversee commissioning, testing, and handover phases



  





**What We Are Looking For** 



* Proven experience as Project Director or Senior Project Manager on major water treatment / desalination projects in Saudi Arabia
* Strong background delivering RO plants, wastewater treatment facilities, or large\-scale utilities infrastructure
* Experience working with leading developers / operators such as ACWA Power, Marafiq, SWCC, or similar
* Demonstrated success managing large EPC or EPCM contracts
* Strong commercial, contractual, and project controls understanding
* Ability to lead complex stakeholder environments and deliver under pressure



  





**Salary \& Package** 




 A highly competitive, tax\-efficient salary and comprehensive expatriate package is on offer, designed to reflect the seniority and strategic importance of this role. This typically includes:
 


* Housing allowance or fully provided accommodation
* Annual flights for you and dependents
* Comprehensive medical and life insurance
* Performance\-related bonus aligned to project delivery
* End of service benefits in line with Saudi labour law
* Full relocation and mobilisation support



  





**Why This Role** 




 This is an opportunity to position yourself at the forefront of the Middle East’s infrastructure growth, working on projects that define national development.
 


* Exposure to flagship, high\-value programmes across Saudi Arabia
* Long\-term project pipeline offering stability and continuity
* Senior leadership role with real influence on project outcomes
* Opportunity to work with some of the most recognised organisations in the region



  





 If you are currently delivering or have delivered major water or desalination projects in Saudi Arabia and are open to exploring a strategic leadership role, I would be keen to speak with you.
 



 To apply or discuss further, please send your CV to
 **saldridge@janikin.com** 
 or reach out directly.
 



  





 Referral recommendations are also welcomed.

data.title: Vice President - Operations
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Role** 




 Future Pipe Industries is seeking an experienced regional executive to lead operations governance across its MENA GeoMarkets. As VP Operations, you will serve as the primary performance authority between GeoMarket Managers and the COO, driving operational excellence, financi
data.jd_text:
**About the Role** 




 Future Pipe Industries is seeking an experienced regional executive to lead operations governance across its MENA GeoMarkets. As VP Operations, you will serve as the primary performance authority between GeoMarket Managers and the COO, driving operational excellence, financial discipline, and strategic alignment across UAE, KSA, Oman, Qatar, Egypt, and Morocco.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Regional Performance Governance: Hold GeoMarket Managers accountable for Safety, Quality, Delivery, and Cost performance. Require corrective action plans where performance deviates from targets and promote replication of best practices across countries.
* Operational Excellence Deployment: Drive consistent deployment of Group operational excellence standards, digital initiatives, and performance management systems across GeoMarkets. Ensure measurable improvement in productivity, reliability, and cost performance.
* Financial Governance \& Discipline: Review and challenge regional budgets and forecasts. Consolidate regional performance visibility and ensure corrective actions are implemented when deviations occur. Escalate material risks or variances to the COO as per governance.
* Risk \& Compliance Oversight: Ensure adherence to Group standards, policies, and RHQ regulatory obligations. Maintain auditable regional management processes with risks identified, assessed, and mitigation plans executed.
* Cross\-Functional Alignment \& Escalation: Act as escalation point for cross\-border operational or commercial conflicts. Align Operations, Sales, Supply Chain, Finance, HSSE, P\&C, Legal, Planning, and Projects.
* HSSE Governance: Ensure GeoMarkets maintain a strong safety culture and full compliance with HSSE policies. Require investigation and closure of incidents and monitor preventive actions.
* People \& Leadership Development: Evaluate performance of GeoMarket Managers. Drive succession planning, leadership development, and talent reviews across the region.



  





**Qualifications \& Experience** 



* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Business Administration, or equivalent
* 10\+ years of senior leadership experience in multi\-site operations
* Demonstrated track record in performance governance and financial review
* Lean / Six Sigma certification (Green Belt or above preferred)
* Fluent in English (spoken and written); Arabic language proficiency is an advantage



  





**Job Specific Skills** 



* Strong financial statement literacy and performance driver analysis
* Structured performance management and execution discipline
* Strong stakeholder management across functions and countries
* Systems / ERP literacy



  





**Core Competencies** 



* Strategic Alignment \& Execution – Converts strategy into measurable execution plans and governance cadence
* Performance Leadership – Sets clear expectations; drives accountability; manages underperformance constructively
* Change Management – Leads structured transformation initiatives; manages resistance and sustains results
* Decision Making – Makes timely decisions with incomplete data; escalates appropriately
* Leadership Development – Coaches and develops GeoMarket Managers; builds bench strength

data.title: Regional Commercial Director
data.raw_snippet:
About the Role
   

  

  

  

 Future Pipe Industries is seeking an experienced Regional Commercial Director to lead and coordinate sales and commercial activities across the Middle East and North Africa region. In this role, you will translate the global commercial strategy into regional executio
data.jd_text:
About the Role
   

  

  

  

 Future Pipe Industries is seeking an experienced Regional Commercial Director to lead and coordinate sales and commercial activities across the Middle East and North Africa region. In this role, you will translate the global commercial strategy into regional execution plans, driving revenue growth, market expansion, and profitability. You will serve as the key link between global commercial leadership and regional sales teams, overseeing pipeline management, strategic account development, and the successful execution of key commercial opportunities.
   

  

  

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

  

  

 •        Regional Commercial Strategy Execution: Translate the global commercial strategy into regional sales plans aligned with FPI's business goals, and coordinate commercial initiatives across MENA markets to ensure consistent execution.
   

  

 •        Regional Sales Performance Management: Oversee and monitor the performance of General Manager Sales roles across MENA, reviewing pipeline development, sales forecasts, and key project opportunities to ensure targets are met.
   

  

 •        Strategic Accounts \& Major Projects: Support negotiation and closure of major regional contracts and strategic projects, while maintaining strong relationships with key clients, consultants, contractors, and partners.
   

  

 •        Market Expansion: Identify new business opportunities and sectors within the MENA region, and support market entry strategies and expansion initiatives in emerging markets.
   

  

 •        Commercial Governance \& Risk Management: Ensure adherence to company policies on pricing strategy, contract governance, and commercial risk management. Monitor margin performance and enforce commercial discipline across regional operations.
   

  

 •        Leadership \& Team Development: Provide leadership, guidance, and coaching to General Manager Sales and regional sales teams. Support talent development, succession planning, and capability building across the regional sales organization.
   

  

  

  

 Qualifications \& Experience
   

  

  

  

 •        Bachelor's Degree in Engineering or a relevant commercial discipline
   

  

 •        15\+ years of experience in sales or commercial roles within an industrial or infrastructure environment
   

  

 •        Minimum 8\-10 years of leadership experience in sales or commercial management
   

  

 •        Experience managing commercial operations across multiple MENA markets
   

  

 •        Strong background in industrial projects, EPC contractors, or infrastructure sectors
   

  

  

  

 Job\-Specific Skills
   

  

  

  

 •        Strong understanding of regional industrial markets and the competitive landscape
   

  

 •        Excellent negotiation and relationship management skills
   

  

 •        Ability to lead and coordinate multi\-country commercial teams
   

  

 •        Strategic thinking and strong commercial acumen
   

  

 •        Strong financial awareness with the ability to manage revenue and margin targets
   

  

 •        Ability to operate effectively in a dynamic and diverse regional environment
   

  

  

  

 Core Competencies
   

  

  

  

 •        Strategic Thinking – Translates global strategy into regional execution plans
   

  

 •        Leadership – Inspires and guides teams to achieve commercial objectives
   

  

 •        Customer Focus – Builds strong long\-term relationships with key clients and partners
   

  

 •        Communication – Communicates clearly across diverse teams and stakeholders
   

  

 •        Market Insight – Demonstrates strong understanding of regional market dynamics
   

  

 •        Financial Acumen – Ensures commercial decisions support profitability and growth

data.title: Head of Transformation
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary:** 




 We are seeking a highly organized and professional
 **Strategy and transformation Lead** 
 responsible for supporting the development and execution of the Group’s strategy and transformation initiatives, translating strategic objectives into actionable programs, and ensuring e
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary:** 




 We are seeking a highly organized and professional
 **Strategy and transformation Lead** 
 responsible for supporting the development and execution of the Group’s strategy and transformation initiatives, translating strategic objectives into actionable programs, and ensuring effective governance, performance monitoring, and cross\-functional alignment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  





**Strategic Planning** 



* Support group long\-term strategy development through structured analysis, opportunity assessment, and benchmarking.
* Develop strategic options, scenarios, and recommendations for executive decision\-making.
* Coordinate the annual business planning cycle across subsidiaries.



  





**Transformation Execution** 



* Lead strategic transformation initiatives across the organization ensuring alignment with business goals.
* Work closely with executive leadership to translate strategic objectives into deliverable programmed and projects.
* Manage the implementation phases of transformation programs.
* Ensure transformation initiatives have defined business cases, owners, milestones, and measurable benefits.



  





**Governance \& Performance Management** 



* Establish and monitor KPIs to evaluate program effectiveness.
* Develop performance dashboards and reporting to track delivery of strategic objectives.
* Support monthly and quarterly executive reviews with structured reporting and recommendations.
* Drive policy development and governance processes to ensure operational efficiency and regulatory compliance.



  





**Collaboration \& Change Management** 



* Collaborate and build consensus around strategic solutions with senior leadership and cross\-functional teams.
* Monitor and track the progress of transformation projects and identify risks with mitigation plans.
* Facilitate change management across the organization.
* Facilitate structured resolution of cross\-entity strategic issues and priority conflicts.
* Requirements



  





  





**Background and Qualifications** 



* Degree in Business, Strategy, Management or similar fields.
* CIPD, PMP, SHRM or equivalent is preferred.
* Typically, 5 to 10 years' experience within strategy, transformation or consulting environments.
* Proven track record of delivering organisational change and transformation initiatives.



  





**Non\-Technical kills:** 



* Excellent organizational skills, having the ability to prioritize workload whilst being resilient and being able to cope well under pressure and meeting tight deadlines.
* Exposure to data gathering techniques and analysis, and reporting insights in a clear and effective way is desirable.
* Ability to evaluate and manage unique challenges.
* Excellent Arabic \& English communication skills (verbal \& written)

data.title: Service Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**A Snapshot of Your Day**
 As a Service Project Manager at Siemens Energy, you will be at the forefront of executing service orders for the compression fleet, driving meaningful projects that enhance operational excellence and customer satisfaction. Your role will involve strategic planning and coo
data.jd_text:
**A Snapshot of Your Day**
 As a Service Project Manager at Siemens Energy, you will be at the forefront of executing service orders for the compression fleet, driving meaningful projects that enhance operational excellence and customer satisfaction. Your role will involve strategic planning and coordination, ensuring that projects are delivered within scope, time, quality, and budget, thereby contributing significantly to Siemens Energy’s mission of sustainable energy solutions. You will work in a dynamic team environment that values collaboration, innovation, and proactive communication, fostering a culture of growth and excellence.
   

  

**How You’ll Make An Impact**
* Execute compression service orders, including parts, repairs, field service, and complete outage projects, ensuring alignment with business objectives.
* Manage customer relationships during order execution, acting as their advocate within the organization and enhancing communication across service offerings.
* Organize and lead teams, define responsibilities, develop schedules, and allocate resources to address specific project challenges effectively.
* Extend service order management to the Middle Eastern region as needed, ensuring seamless execution and delivery.
* Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to achieve revenue, EBIT, on\-time delivery, and project delivery targets, while driving client satisfaction and supporting cash collection.
* Collaborate with finance for accurate forecasting and coordinate with global teams to align service order execution with global standards.


**What You Bring**
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, project management, or a related field, with 4\-6 years of relevant experience in project management, preferably in the Oil \& Gas industry or with rotating equipment.
* Strong analytical, organizational, and leadership skills, with the ability to develop and implement strategic plans effectively.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and experience with project management and order management tools and concepts.
* Self\-driven and adaptable, with a positive attitude and the ability to solve challenges collaboratively.
* Familiarity with CRM (Salesforce) and ERP software (e.g., SAP) is highly desirable, enhancing operational efficiency.
* Excellent communication, networking, and relationship\-building skills, with strong leadership abilities to influence stakeholders and drive project success.


**About The Team**
 Our Transformation of Industry division is decarbonizing the industrial sector. Increasing electrification and efficiency are key and demand for green H2 and derivative fuels will rise. We enable decarbonization of the industrial sector and the transition to sustainable processes, building on a strong industrial customer base, a global network, diverse technologies, and integrated execution capabilities.
   

  

**Who is Siemens Energy?**
 At Siemens Energy, we are more than just an energy technology company. With \~100,000 dedicated employees in more than 90 countries, we develop the energy systems of the future, ensuring that the growing energy demand of the global community is met reliably and sustainably. The technologies created in our research departments and factories drive the energy transition and provide the base for one sixth of the world's electricity generation.
   

  

 Our global team is committed to making sustainable, reliable, and affordable energy a reality by pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We uphold a 150\-year legacy of innovation that encourages our search for people who will support our focus on decarbonization, new technologies, and energy transformation.
   

  

 Find out how you can make a difference at Siemens Energy: https://www.siemens\-energy.com/employeevideo
   

  

**Our Commitment to Diversity**
 Lucky for us, we are not all the same. Through diversity we generate power. We run on inclusion and our combined creative energy is fueled by over 130 nationalities. Siemens Energy celebrates character – no matter what ethnic background, gender, age, religion, identity, or disability. We energize society, all of society, and we do not discriminate based on our differences.
   

  

**Rewards/Benefits**
* Opportunities to work with a global team
* Opportunities to work on and lead a variety of innovative projects
* Continual learning through the Learn@Siemens\-Energy platform


 https://jobs.siemens\-energy.com/jobs
   

  

 The job posting will remain open for applications for 14 days from the posting date.

data.raw_snippet:
**Position Overview**
 We are seeking a highly organized, detail\-oriented, and dependable
 **Junior Project Manager** 
 to support our expanding remote operations team. This role plays a key part in coordinating projects and workflows across regional teams in the MENA region, including the UAE, Qat
data.jd_text:
**Position Overview**
 We are seeking a highly organized, detail\-oriented, and dependable
 **Junior Project Manager** 
 to support our expanding remote operations team. This role plays a key part in coordinating projects and workflows across regional teams in the MENA region, including the UAE, Qatar, and Saudi Arabia.
   

  

 This is an
 **entry\-level position** 
 ideal for individuals looking to build a strong foundation in project coordination, operations management, workflow optimization, and cross\-functional collaboration. The ideal candidate thrives in structured environments, values precision, and takes ownership of keeping projects organized and on track.
   

  

 You will contribute to the successful delivery of projects by maintaining accurate documentation, tracking progress, coordinating tasks, and ensuring alignment across teams. Your work will directly support operational efficiency and timely project execution.
   

  

 No prior professional experience is required—
 **full training and structured guidance will be provided** 
 .
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Project Coordination \& Execution**
* Assist in planning, organizing, and tracking project timelines and deliverables
* Break down project tasks and ensure clear assignment to team members
* Monitor progress and ensure tasks are completed on schedule
* Follow up on delays, blockers, or dependencies
* Support project managers in day\-to\-day coordination activities


**Task \& Workflow Management**
* Review incoming project\-related requests and prioritize accordingly
* Assign and route tasks to appropriate stakeholders
* Track task progress from initiation to completion
* Maintain clear documentation of task status and updates
* Ensure workflows follow defined processes and standards


**Data Management \& Documentation**
* Maintain and update project trackers (Google Sheets / Excel / project tools)
* Ensure data accuracy, completeness, and consistency
* Organize project documentation using structured systems
* Maintain logs of updates, changes, and key project actions
* Identify and resolve inconsistencies or missing information


**Reporting \& Communication**
* Prepare regular project status updates and summaries
* Communicate progress, risks, and issues clearly to stakeholders
* Identify recurring challenges or inefficiencies
* Escalate risks or delays when necessary
* Support internal reporting with accurate and organized data


**Scheduling \& Team Coordination**
* Assist with scheduling meetings, deadlines, and milestones
* Track team availability and project timelines
* Send reminders for upcoming deadlines and deliverables
* Support onboarding coordination and checklist tracking


**Quality Assurance \& Process Improvement**
* Review project outputs for accuracy and completeness
* Ensure compliance with internal processes and SOPs
* Maintain consistency in documentation and reporting
* Identify opportunities to improve workflows and efficiency
* Support updates to internal documentation and procedures


**Performance Expectations**
* Maintain high levels of accuracy and attention to detail
* Ensure projects and tasks stay organized and on schedule
* Communicate clearly and professionally across teams
* Proactively follow up on pending or unclear items
* Demonstrate accountability in a remote work environment
* Adhere to structured processes and workflows


**Required Qualifications**
* Basic proficiency in Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel
* Strong written communication skills
* Strong organizational and time management abilities
* Ability to follow processes and instructions consistently
* Comfortable working with structured workflows and repetitive tasks
* Ability to work independently in a remote environment
* Reliable internet connection and computer access
* Entry\-level candidates welcome (training provided)


**Work Details**
* Location: Fully Remote
* Region Supported: MENA Region (UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia)
* Schedule: Flexible, with consistent availability required
* Hours: Full\-time or part\-time depending on workload
* Compensation: Based on experience and engagement


**Ideal Candidate Profile**
* Starting a career in project management or operations
* Enjoys organizing tasks, timelines, and workflows
* Detail\-oriented and process\-driven
* Strong sense of accountability and ownership
* Interested in long\-term remote career growth


**Growth \& Career Development**
**You Will Gain Hands\-on Experience In**
* Project coordination and delivery
* Workflow and task management systems
* Stakeholder communication and reporting


**Potential Career Progression Paths**
* Project Manager
* Operations Coordinator
* Program Coordinator
* Workflow Analyst
* Team Lead
* Operations Manager


**Why Join Us?**
* 100% remote work environment
* Entry\-level friendly with full training provided
* Structured processes and clear expectations
* Supportive and growth\-focused team culture
* Exposure to regional MENA operations
* Long\-term career development opportunities


**Job Requirements Summary**
* Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
* Clear written communication
* Ability to manage tasks and timelines effectively
* Basic spreadsheet proficiency
* Self\-motivated and reliable in a remote setting

data.title: Project Manager – Credit Card Migration
data.raw_snippet:
We are looking for a
 **Project Manager \- Credit Card Migration to join a well\-known Islamic Bank in Bahrain.** 
 The Ideal candidate will lead and deliver end\-to\-end credit card system and/or portfolio migration initiatives, ensuring successful execution across scope, time, budget, quality, and
data.jd_text:
We are looking for a
 **Project Manager \- Credit Card Migration to join a well\-known Islamic Bank in Bahrain.** 
 The Ideal candidate will lead and deliver end\-to\-end credit card system and/or portfolio migration initiatives, ensuring successful execution across scope, time, budget, quality, and operational readiness. Own the migration governance, planning, stakeholder coordination, execution, cutover, and post go\-live stabilization while ensuring accurate data reconciliation and business sign\-off.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\) Project Governance \& Delivery Management** 



* Define and apply an appropriate project management framework and delivery governance (steering, working groups, RAID, milestones, reporting cadence) to ensure completion within agreed scope, quality, and timelines.
* Prepare the project brief/charter and initiation documentation; establish clear scope boundaries, assumptions, dependencies, and acceptance criteria.
* Manage scope changes through structured change control; drive decisions and approvals in a timely manner.
* Manage project risks/issues and ensure mitigation plans are actively owned and executed.



**2\) Credit Card Migration Planning \& Execution** 



* Own the end\-to\-end migration approach for new Credit Card system setup and/or system/portfolio migration, including strategy, sequencing, trial conversions, and final migration execution.
* Lead the planning and execution of parallel run and cutover planning.
* Lead data reconciliation and business sign\-off activities.
* Manage migration of account, card, transaction, installment, and fee data.
* Ensure readiness for authorization, clearing, billing, settlement, and collections flows.
* Ensure migration readiness across business, operations, technology, and vendors, including runbooks, cutover checklists, and rollback considerations.



**3\) Testing \& Environment Readiness (SIT/UAT/Parallel Run)** 



* Plan and manage SIT, UAT, and Parallel Run activities end\-to\-end, including test strategy, scope, entry/exit criteria, defect triage, and governance.
* Coordinate business users for UAT execution and sign\-off.
* Drive closure of defects, gaps, and reconciliation breaks prior to go\-live.



**4\) Data Migration, Reconciliation \& Controls** 



* Lead the data migration lifecycle: strategy, mapping, extraction, transformation, loading, trial runs, and reconciliation.
* Establish reconciliation controls and sign\-off packs between old and new systems.
* Ensure accuracy and completeness for key datasets and balances; drive resolution of discrepancies.



**5\) Scheme \& Platform / Vendor Coordination** 



* Work effectively with CMS platforms (VisionPLUS) and associated vendors/partners, ensuring delivery alignment, integration readiness, and clear responsibilities (RACI).
* Ensure the migration scope covers Visa/Mastercard data and scheme\-related flows in alignment with business requirements and operational cutover needs.



**6\) Shariah\-Compliant Product Considerations (Preferred)** 



* Ensure the solution and migration approach supports Shariah\-compliant card structures, preferably Tawarruq/Murabaha\-based settlement and profit calculation rules.
* Coordinate requirements validation and sign\-offs with relevant product owners and compliance stakeholders as applicable.



**7\) Go\-Live Command Center \& Hypercare** 



* Lead the cutover and go\-live command center, including war\-room governance, tracking, and escalation management.
* Lead post go\-live hypercare, ensuring issue triage, prioritization, resolution tracking, and stabilization closure with formal acceptance.



**Required Knowledge \& Experience (Must Have)** 



* In\-depth understanding of credit card lifecycle including: issuance, authorization, billing, settlement, reconciliation, collections, disputes, and chargebacks.
* Proven experience managing and executing credit card migration projects (system migration and/or portfolio migration).
* Knowledge of CMS platforms (VisionPLUS).
* In\-depth understanding and experience on: parallel run and cutover planning; data reconciliation and sign\-off; account, card, transaction, installment, and fee data; authorization, clearing, billing, and collections flows; data migration strategy, trial conversions, and reconciliation.
* Experience working on Visa/Mastercard data.
* Hands\-on experience managing SIT, UAT, and Parallel Run.
* Experience leading cutover planning and Go Live command center.
* Proven ability to lead post GoLive hypercare and issue resolution.



**Preferred / Advantage** 



* Understanding of Shariah\-compliant card structures, preferably Tawarruq/Murabaha\-based settlement and profit calculation rules.
* Experience in setting up a new Credit Card system (greenfield implementation) in addition to migration.



**Education \& Certifications** 



* Bachelor’s degree in a relevant discipline.
* PMI certification (or equivalent) is strongly preferred.



**Core Competencies \& Skills** 



* Excellent communication and stakeholder management across business, technology, and vendors.
* Customer focus and outcome\-driven delivery mindset.
* Strong planning and organizing skills with governance discipline and structured execution.
* Problem solving, analytical thinking, and a strong reconciliation mindset.
* Accountability and ownership; ability to lead under pressure during cutover/go\-live.
* Ability to negotiate, influence, and broker alignment across multiple stakeholders.



**Key Deliverables (Examples)** 



* Project charter, integrated plan, governance calendar, RAID log, and weekly/monthly status reports.
* Migration strategy and detailed cutover runbook (including rehearsal outcomes).
* Trial conversion results and reconciliation sign\-off packs.
* SIT/UAT/Parallel Run plans, defect dashboards, and final readiness assessment.
* Go\-live command center tracker and hypercare closure report.



**Stakeholders / Interfaces** 



* Cards Business/Product, Operations (billing/settlement/collections), IT delivery teams, Data/Integration teams.
* Vendors (CMS/VisionPLUS), scheme partners (Visa/Mastercard), and internal governance (PMO/SteerCo).

data.jd_text:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an Executive Project Manager in Saudi Arabia.**
 This role focuses on driving execution excellence across multiple high\-impact initiatives within a fast\-paced, global digital environment.
   

  

 You will oversee parallel project streams, ensuring alignment across product, data, and operational teams.
   

  

 The position requires strong coordination skills to accelerate delivery timelines and remove execution blockers.
   

  

 You will play a key role in translating strategic priorities into fully implemented end\-to\-end solutions.
   

  

 The environment is highly cross\-functional, data\-driven, and collaborative, spanning international teams and stakeholders.
   

  

 This is a key leadership delivery role where operational clarity and execution speed directly influence business outcomes.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Own execution across multiple concurrent initiatives, ensuring timely and high\-quality delivery across streams
* Align roadmaps and priorities between product, analytics, and operations teams to improve coordination and speed
* Identify, analyze, and remove operational and technical blockers that slow down implementation
* Drive cross\-functional collaboration between product, data, and partner\-facing operational teams
* Ensure initiatives are fully executed end\-to\-end, from planning through implementation and adoption
* Bridge capability gaps between teams when needed to ensure seamless delivery across functions


**Requirements**
* Proven experience in project management, program management, or delivery management in large\-scale organizations
* Strong background in cross\-functional delivery within complex, data\-driven environments
* Experience working with experimentation frameworks such as A/B testing and analytics\-informed decision\-making
* Demonstrated ability to implement change in existing systems rather than only launching new products
* Comfortable managing multiple stakeholders with competing priorities in a global environment
* Strong communication, coordination, and problem\-solving skills with a delivery\-first mindset


**Benefits**
* Fully remote full\-time opportunity
* 28 calendar days of annual vacation
* 7 wellness days per year for personal rest or household needs without using sick leave
* Referral bonuses up to $5000 for successful candidate recommendations
* 50% coverage of professional training, conferences, and industry events
* Corporate discounts for English language learning
* Health benefits including up to $1,000 gross annually for medical insurance or healthcare expenses for you and eligible family members
* Workplace support including equipment provision or remote workspace reimbursement up to $1,000 gross every 3 years
* Internal gamified rewards system redeemable for merchandise, team activities, and wellness perks


**How Jobgether Works**
 We use an
 **AI\-powered matching process** 
 to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top\-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
   

  

 We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
   

  

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

**Data Privacy Notice:** 
 By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre\-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

data.title: General Manager - Project Management
data.raw_snippet:
About the Role
 



  





 Future Pipe Industries is looking for a seasoned General Manager to lead project management across its GeoMarket operations. In this role, you will plan and develop project ideas from inception to delivery, ensuring objectives are met on time, within budget, and to speci
data.jd_text:
About the Role
 



  





 Future Pipe Industries is looking for a seasoned General Manager to lead project management across its GeoMarket operations. In this role, you will plan and develop project ideas from inception to delivery, ensuring objectives are met on time, within budget, and to specification. You will set goals aligned with organizational strategy, drive efficiency through motivation and coaching, and take ownership of delegation, process improvement, and team development.
 



  





  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  





  





 • Leadership: Drive and motivate teams to meet project goals, foster a positive and high\-performance culture, develop clear execution plans, eliminate bureaucracy, and guide teams toward successful outcomes.
 



 • Communication: Clearly and effectively communicate tasks, goals, expectations, and company objectives. Apply constructive feedback to encourage continuous improvement across the team.
 



 • Time Management: Set appropriate deadlines and ensure they are met without exception. Prioritize tasks effectively and develop efficient strategies for completing all agenda items.
 



 • Reliability: Be accessible and supportive to team members, creating an environment of confidence and security. Review budgets proactively and take appropriate action to prevent overruns.
 



 • Decisiveness: Take ownership of critical decisions, including major choices on short notice, with clarity and confidence.
 



 • Customer Satisfaction: Minimize uncertainties, avoid unwanted surprises, and keep customers informed and engaged throughout the project lifecycle.
 



 • Expertise: Act as an industry expert, providing knowledge and guidance to support the team at every stage of project execution.
 



  





  





 Qualifications \& Experience
 



  





  





 • MBA, MSc in Engineering, or MeC in Business Economics
 



 • Degree in Business Management or a Master's in Business Administration
 



 • 15\+ years of progressive experience in project management, with a track record of delivering complex, multi\-site projects
 



 • Focused, target\-driven, and results\-oriented
 



 • Strong problem\-solving ability and a collaborative team player
 



 • Steady, composed character with the resilience to perform under pressure
 



  





  





 Job\-Specific Skills
 



  





  





 • Good knowledge of different business functions
 



 • Strong leadership and people management qualities
 



 • Excellent verbal and written communication skills
 



 • Highly organized with meticulous attention to detail
 



 • Strong work ethic and proactive mindset
 



 • Good interpersonal and relationship\-building skills
 



  





  





 Core Competencies
 



  





  





 • Leadership \& People Management – Inspires, develops, and holds teams accountable
 



 • Problem Solving – Identifies root causes and implements effective solutions under pressure
 



 • Negotiation – Builds alignment with internal and external stakeholders to achieve project goals
 



 • Strategic Thinking – Translates organizational objectives into actionable project plans
 



 • Data Analysis – Uses data to assess performance, forecast risks, and drive decisions
 



 • Communication – Delivers clear, consistent messaging across all levels of the organization

data.title: Retail Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Summary**
 The candidate should be a natural leader and have worked with reputable joinery manufacturing companies and the interiors industry (similar to Havelock One) for the last 8 years with experience in managing customs and retail installation projects.
   

  

 As a Project Manager, th
data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
 The candidate should be a natural leader and have worked with reputable joinery manufacturing companies and the interiors industry (similar to Havelock One) for the last 8 years with experience in managing customs and retail installation projects.
   

  

 As a Project Manager, the person must be self\-driven with a high responsibility level; capable of effectively launching and managing multiple projects of different sizes from award of project and through the different stages of implementation to handover independently. Versatile and adaptive management of internal and external stakeholders is key. Communication skills are very important for the role, and the successful candidate will be a natural communicator and good articulator in both oral and written English.
   

  

 The profile will be a naturally dependable member of the leadership team that is able to bring about improvement and measurable positive changes in output and efficiency over time.
   

  

 The profile will be a team player, able to identify strengths and weaknesses in a situation and bring out the best of people in challenging situations.
   

  

**Role Description**
**Project Kick\-off** 
**:**
* Set up a kick\-off meeting with relevant internal Havelock One departments and the appointed fit\- out team. Where necessary, coordinate with the general contractor team to align project scope, timeline, and expectations


**Site Assessment**
* If needed to be able to conduct initial site visits, perform surveys, take photographs, identify loading zones, and provide feedback to the Setting Out Manager (SOM) regarding any crucial dimensions or site\-specific considerations


**Technical Expertise**
* Utilize hands\-on experience or expertise to carry out the setting out/marking of joinery equipment on\-site if needed
* Coordinate and address any technical queries posed by the client or general contractor team during the project kick\-o? and the Mw manufacturing cycle
* Coordinate and address any technical queries posed by the client or general contractor team during


 MW installation by thoroughly understanding the MW equipment throughout its lifecycle.
   

  

**Project Management**
* and the project's work schedule, preferably using MS Projects, to ensure timelines are met
* Generate daily/weekly site progress reports, including necessary photos, and submit them to the Project Manager (PM) and SOM for review
* Manage multiple projects at various stages of development, independently prioritizing and executing tasks to meet deadlines and achieve objectives
* Proactively manage ongoing projects, taking initiatives on tasks without requiring constant supervision or follow\-ups


**Communication And Coordination**
* Maintain effective communication and coordination with fit\-out teams, factory personnel, and clients/client representatives daily. Relay any discrepancies to the line manager for quick resolution
* Observe the installation process first\-hand and report to the setting out team any adjustments needed to the MW equipment to facilitate future fit\-out installations
* Demonstrate high self\-confidence and clear self\-expression during client interactions, negotiations with client demands appropriately and handling high\-pressure situations with composure
* Effectively coordinate with fit\-out teams, considering the full project scope when assigning tasks, and providing direct responses to on\-site queries and issues


**Travel And Flexibility**
* Willingness to travel to countries in the MENA region and beyond. Adapt to flexible working hours, including weekends, depending on travel and site plans as required


**Experience**
**Candidate Requirements**
* Minimum of five to eight years similar experience in a joinery manufacturing companies with experience in managing hospitality and entertainment projects


**Skills**
* Proficient in verbal and written English
* Ability to work with AutoCAD, Excel, Word, and MS Projects
* Strong customer service skills, ensuring client satisfaction and addressing concerns promptly


**Attributes**
* Sound knowledge of fabrication procedures and a wide understanding of joinery materials including timber, boards, veneers, laminates, hardware, fabrics, glass, stone, lighting etc are vital
* An individual with high responsibility levels who takes ownership of matters, has good planning \& time management capabilities, effective communicator and basically a flexible individual who can take decisions and make things happen in a large setup
* Excellent organizational and time\-management skills
* Strong problem\-solving abilities and attention to detail
* Ability to work independently as well as part of a team
* Strong interpersonal skills to effectively liaise with diverse stakeholders
* Self\-driven with a strong internal drive to achieve goals and tackle challenges head\-on without the need for external motivation
* Intrinsically motivated, consistently seeking out new opportunities for growth and improvement
* Excel at managing multiple tasks simultaneously, ensuring that each receives the attention and e?ort needed to succeed
* Ability to plan thoroughly, considering potential consequences and the bigger picture
* Capacity to follow clear instructions and ensure the correct implementation on\-site

data.title: Director of Operations | Engineering
data.raw_snippet:
**About you:** 




  





**Join us. Unleash your energy within.** 




  





 If you have world\-class ambitions to reach the stars while keeping your feet on the ground, we’re the team for you. We've created a new breed of company – future\-focused with reimagined ambition across all disciplin
data.jd_text:
**About you:** 




  





**Join us. Unleash your energy within.** 




  





 If you have world\-class ambitions to reach the stars while keeping your feet on the ground, we’re the team for you. We've created a new breed of company – future\-focused with reimagined ambition across all disciplines within the energy sector.
 



  





 We love people who know their own potential and are not afraid to use it. We know that together, we’re far more than the sum of our parts. So, we celebrate people who want to grow and develop as we work together on some of the largest projects on the energy world stage.
 



  





 We are committed to our diverse and inclusive community – a place where we can all be ourselves, thrive and develop. From day one, we offer a range of family\-friendly, inclusive employment policies, flexible working arrangements, and employee networks to support staff from different backgrounds.
 



  





 As an Equal Opportunities Employer, we value applications from all backgrounds, cultures, and abilities.
 



  





 We’re a disability\-friendly employer and can make adjustments to support you to perform at your best during the recruitment process.
 



  





**Our purpose and beliefs:** 




  





 As Kent, we’re tackling the greatest challenge of our time \- to bring our world the energy it needs in the most responsible way ever imagined.
 



  





 It’s the energy of every member of our team driven by our beliefs that is making this happen. Whatever our skill, our language, or our culture. These beliefs define and direct us every day to be the very best \- for ourselves, our clients, our key stakeholders, the communities we operate in and the planet:
 



  





 We PLAY BIG
 



 We thrive on EMOTIONAL AGILITY
 



 We are FANATICAL ABOUT PERFORMANCE
 



 We are built on INFINITE THINKING
 



  





 Read more about the Purpose, Beliefs and Guiding Principles that drive us:
 



  





**Our vision for Diversity, Inclusion and Belonging:** 




  





 We recognize that diversity \& inclusion are catalysts for success. We’re heightening awareness on the benefits of people diversity, diversity of experiences and diversity of our perspectives. Creating a culture of inclusivity where all employees feel a sense of belonging.
 



  





 Our combined energy is fueled by different nationalities, across 6 continents and 24 countries. Our commitment is to celebrate character – no matter what ethnic background, gender, age, religion, identity, or disability.
 



  





**About the job:** 




  





 Kent is seeking an
 **Operations Director \- Engineering** 
 to join our growing engineering Team within the Oil \& Gas market in
 **Khobar, Saudi Arabia** 
 . This is a pivotal opportunity to help shape a new and expanding team, strengthen our technical capability, and enhance Kent’s presence and reputation across the sector.
 



  





  





**Details / responsibilities:** 




  




* Monitor and overall manage project management and engineering teams for engineering delivery and ensure appropriate engineering standard and integrity of the work within the specified contracted scope, HSSE and Quality standards and within Budget and Schedule.
* Overall Business Planning and lookahead scenario analysis to manage resource allocation and recruitment to deliver required portfolio of engineering projects year upon year
* Monitor and manage overheads within budget and deliver revenue and gross margin targets for Engineering in line with the business plan
* Lead a team of multiple discipline design engineers and draughtsman in the proper execution of engineering related activities for various projects, supported by the Engineering Director who is directly responsible for the Engineering Departments and day to day quality of engineering
* Further develop the current team in order to cater to Engineering Studies, Pre\-FEED, FEED and Detailed Design capabilities for various projects in the future in line with agreed strategies for the business
* Develop and input to win strategies for tenders, work with proposals and business development and take responsibility for engineering teams providing key input including engineering assessment of scope, assumptions, development of execution plans, deliverables, estimation of engineering hours and responding to client technical clarifications and queries to our tenders.
* Pre\-award activities such as preliminary design, preparation of tender drawings and material take\-offs, cost estimation of material, plant \& preliminaries, collaborating with commercial / procurement in preparation of quotation, material sourcing \& vendor development
* Manage any design issues with sub\-contractors and ensure compliance with the client design requirements
* Engage, mentor, support and motivate local staff in their development and integration into the positive values and culture within the group
* Provide opportunities and guidance that enable the transfer of learning into effective practice for local staff and their managers
* Assess the skills, values and knowledge of new and current staff against the standards that apply to their role in order to devise individual, sector and service development plans
* Provide learning opportunities related to the assessed needs of staff including induction and induction mentorship and continuing development opportunities, regularly reviewing and evaluating their experiences over their employment journey



  





  





 In addition to the responsibilities listed herein, the employee may be required to perform other ad\-hoc tasks as needed or directed by the supervisor or management. These tasks will be within the reasonable scope of the employee's skills, capabilities, and role within the organization. The intent of this provision is to allow for flexibility and adaptability in meeting the dynamic needs of the organization, ensuring that operational requirements can be met efficiently. All such tasks will be assigned considering the employee's current workload and with respect to their professional development.
 



  





**Your knowledge/skills, education, and experience:** 




  




* Demonstrated extensive experience in working in an oil and gas company in a senior managerial role
* Post\-secondary diploma or degree in engineering, project/ construction management or related discipline
* Minimum 12 years of work experience in the engineering team and or engineering manager role in oil and gas industry
* Must have worked as an Engineering Manager in a large EPC company or on EPC projects
* Must be capable of leading multiple disciplines and effectively interface with all disciplines in house and with those of the client
* Must have excellent design related skills in terms of interpreting designs and to help the design team produce working or production drawings effectively
* Fully conversant with international engineering codes as well as those typically used in KSA



  





  





**Communication:** 




  




* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Strong client engagement skills focused on clarity and technical assurance.
* Able to lead teams and establish clear communication routines.



  





  





**Behavioral Competency** 



* At Kent you will be accountable for the performance and results of multiple teams across a single discipline, or a medium\-sized function in a large market or medium\-sized division. You will influence others internally and externally, including senior leaders. You will be providing leadership to Managers, and Professionals or Technicians, and the area of your impact typically will be at a country level. You will identify and resolve complex operational and organizational problems.



  





**HSSEQ:** 




  





 The Employee shall observe the Health, Safety, Sustainability, Environment and Quality rules of the Company; it’s clients and the governing authorities of the host country.

data.jd_text:
**Role: Project Manager (Functional)** 




**Work Location: Manama, Bahrain** 




  





 Unity Infotech (
 **www.unityinfotech.com** 
 ) is a leading technology solutions provider specializing in payments and banking products across the Middle East. Founded in 2009 and headquartered in Dubai, with research \& development and support centers in India and Bahrain, we partner with banks, financial institutions, and government organizations to deliver secure, innovative, and simplified digital solutions.
 



  





 With a strong presence in the Middle East, we are at the forefront of digital transformation in the region, helping clients modernize legacy systems, adopt global standards like ISO20022/SWIFT, and embrace real\-time payments.
 



 At Unity Infotech, we believe in:
 


* **Innovation** 
 – building future\-ready financial solutions.
* **Collaboration** 
 – working closely with clients and teams across regions.
* **Growth** 
 – offering employees opportunities to learn, lead, and thrive.



 Joining Unity Infotech means being part of a dynamic, multicultural environment where your work directly impacts the future of banking and payments in the GCC and beyond.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 Unity Infotech is looking for a
 **Functional Project Manager** 
 to lead payments and banking product initiatives in our Bahrain office. This role requires strong functional expertise in financial services, excellent project management skills, and the ability to collaborate across business, compliance, and technology teams. You will be responsible for ensuring projects are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with regulatory standards.
 








**Desired Skills \& Competencies** 



* 6–10 years of project management experience in banking, fintech, or IT services.
* Strong knowledge of payment systems (cards, SWIFT, ACH, real\-time payments, UPI equivalents).
* Familiarity with regulatory frameworks and compliance standards in the GCC region.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and leadership skills.
* Proficiency in project management tools (JIRA, MS Project, Confluence, etc.).
* PMP/Prince2/Agile certification preferred.
* Experience working in multicultural environments and with international clients.



  





**What You Will Do** 



* Lead end\-to\-end project execution for payments and banking product implementations.
* Define project scope, objectives, and deliverables in alignment with client requirements.
* Collaborate with business analysts, product owners, and technical teams to translate functional needs into actionable plans.
* Manage stakeholder communication across clients, compliance, and technology functions.
* Monitor project progress, identify risks, and implement mitigation strategies.
* Ensure adherence to regulatory and compliance requirements in Bahrain and international markets.
* Prepare and present project status reports, dashboards, and executive updates.



 Drive process improvements and best practices in project governance.

data.title: Project Controls Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
 Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy
data.jd_text:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
 Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy sources, while helping to provide the energy, chemicals and resources needed now.
   

  

 At Worley, we’re building a diverse, inclusive and respectful workplace. Creating a space where everyone feels they belong, can be themselves, and can thrive is essential to our mission of delivering sustainable change. We know that diverse and inclusive cultures are safer and more innovative.
   

  

 We encourage applications from candidates from all backgrounds and diversity characteristics and warmly encourage disabled or neuro divergent candidates to apply.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Planning \& Scheduling**
* Develop and maintain integrated project schedules using tools such as Primavera P6\.
* Ensure alignment with Saudi Aramco scheduling standards and milestones.
* Monitor schedule performance and identify critical path impacts.


**Cost Control \& Budgeting**
* Establish project budgets, cost breakdown structures (CBS), and control baselines.
* Monitor project expenditures, commitments, and forecasts.
* Perform variance analysis and recommend corrective actions.


**Progress Measurement \& Reporting**
* Develop and implement progress measurement systems.
* Prepare weekly and monthly progress reports for Worley and Saudi Aramco stakeholders.
* Track KPIs and ensure accurate project performance visibility.


**Risk \& Change Management**
* Lead risk identification, analysis, and mitigation planning.
* Manage change control processes in line with Saudi Aramco procedures.
* Evaluate cost and schedule impacts of changes and variations.


**Project Controls Systems \& Governance**
* Implement project controls procedures, tools, and systems.
* Ensure compliance with Worley and Saudi Aramco project control frameworks.
* Conduct audits and reviews of project controls practices.


**Stakeholder Coordination**
* Interface with engineering, procurement, construction, and client teams.
* Participate in client meetings and presentations.
* Provide strategic insights to support decision\-making.


**Team Leadership**
* Lead and mentor project controls team (planners, cost engineers, risk analysts).
* Allocate resources and oversee team performance.
* Promote continuous improvement and best practices.


**Qualifications \& Experience**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or related field.
* Experienced in project controls within oil \& gas, EPC, or energy sectors.
* Proven experience on Saudi Aramco projects is highly preferred.
* Strong expertise in Primavera P6, cost control systems, and reporting tools.
* In\-depth knowledge of EPC project lifecycle and large\-scale capital projects.


**Moving forward together**
 We’re committed to building a diverse, inclusive and respectful workplace where everyone feels they belong, can bring themselves, and are heard. We provide equal employment opportunities to all qualified applicants and employees without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, disability status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, citizenship status or any other basis as protected by law.
   

  

 We want our people to be energized and empowered to drive sustainable impact. So, our focus is on a values\-inspired culture that unlocks brilliance through belonging, connection and innovation.
   

  

 And we're not just talking about it; we're doing it. We're reskilling our people, leveraging transferable skills, and supporting the transition of our workforce to become experts in today's low carbon energy infrastructure and technology.
   

  

 Whatever your ambition, there’s a path for you here. And there’s no barrier to your potential career success. Join us to broaden your horizons, explore diverse opportunities, and be part of delivering sustainable change.

data.jd_text:
**Position\- CSA Project Manager**
**Location\- Dammam\- Saudi Arabia**
**Role:**
 The Project Manager is responsible for delivering and leading the assigned project. This includes review of handover documentation from Tender Team, Project Kick\-off, planning, executing, controlling, monitoring and closing out the project, while managing risks, opportunities, commercial management, timelines, resources and the entire scope of the project. The Project Manager is required to act as the primary focal point of contact between JEG Senior Management, the Client, Consultants and the JEG Project Delivery Team ensuring the desired project objectives are delivered meeting all set project objectives
   

  

**Project Roles And Responsibilities**
* Direct line of report Regional Projects Director
* Critique tender documentation / Pre\-Construction project handover documentation, identify project risks and opportunities with Project Leads
* Manages the expectations of project leadership and stakeholders throughout the project.
* Ensures all departments are complying with all standard JEG SOP’s
* Responsible for managing the execution of all project milestones/deliverables. Establish and monitor program and project controls KPI's.
* Acts as a primary day to day liaison to the client project leadership teams and project execution partners.
* Identifies and resolve disputes quickly and reasonably with Project Stakeholders.
* Develops and maintains a comprehensive project plan, in keeping with the size and complexity as mutually agreed upon by the JEG organization SOP and the Project Director.
* Provides leadership and actively manages the project team resources within the confines of the project, identifying any deficiencies to the Project Director.
* Ensure that the health and safety requirements are provided in coordination with HSE Manager and that they comply with JEG HSE requirements and authorities’ regulations. Ensure regular audits are carried out for EHS compliance and any remedial actions are implemented in coordination with the HSE Manager.
* Manages detailed project planning documentation in conjunction with the Project Controls Engineer (Execution Plans, Risk Mgmt. Log, Status Reports, Schedule Reports, Progress Reports), these reports shall be prepared in accordance with Regional JEG Standardized Reporting Template formats.
* Manages detailed Project Budget Reports detailing Preliminaries, Procurement, indirect and direct staff, Subcontractors and overheads / Cost forecasts in conjunction with the QS / Project Controls Engineer with consultation of Project Director and Commercial Director
* Actively manages, communicates and mitigates project risks and issues and escalates when necessary


**Experience \& Qualifications**
* Time served apprenticeship an advantage.
* Minimum 10 years work experience on construction projects / Minimum 3 years as a Project Manager
* Qualifications commensurate with position:
* Role applicable degree from a reputed university / Trade Qualifications NVQ, etc.
* Experience in Data Centre Projects.
* Competent in the use of PC applications (Microsoft Office suit or equivalent)
* Civil/ CSA experience
