data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**Remarkable people, trusted by clients to design and advance the world**
 Wood is recruiting for a Senior Project Controller to join our team in Oman.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Designing the future. Transforming the world**
 Reflecting the market focus for the brownfield and green field opportunities, multi\-skilled personnel are sought, in particular those with experience in refinery and petrochemical industry.
   

  

**What We Can Offer**
* Meaningful and interesting projects delivered to leaders of industry across oil and gas and emerging energy sectors
* Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion; we are an organisation actively committed to diversity and inclusion across our business with employee networks committed to giving all employees a voice
* Competitive salary with regular salary reviews to ensure we are rewarding at the right level in line with the market
* Employee Assistance Programme: Allows you to feel comfortable knowing that you or your immediate family members can confidentially discuss any work or personal issues that are an inevitable part of life. The programme helps support your mental, physical, social \& financial well\-being.
* Professional Memberships; One professional membership, registration, subscription, certification and/or license cost per annum for all active Wood employees. The membership must be relevant to the role you are currently employed in or be part of a development plan. Reimbursement should be claimed via the expenses procedure system, with supporting evidence.
* Global connections: join experts around the world who are at the leading edge of our industry, shaping the standards of our profession


**Typical Responsibilities**
* Maintain and Develop overall project master schedule.
* Identify the critical milestones and ensure appropriate actions are taken.
* Assist Project Director/Manager/Team Leader in day\-to\-day planning \& controlling of projects.
* Liaise with all the project teams to ensure that the overall project progress is reported correctly and mitigation actions / recovery plans are developed for any significant variance from the plan.
* Review and comment on the Contractor project schedule.
* Review the work of the Contractor and Company Consultant, checking and certifying of execution documentation \& reports.
* Ensure activities are performed in accordance with established Company Quality procedures, HSE Codes and standards and recognized industry standards
* Provide reporting to the Project Director as per the project calendar and Company Project Controls procedures.
* Development of local engineers and providing development programs to ensure capability in takeover of planning responsibilities.
* Lead and manage a team planning and project control engineers assigned in different project or locations.


**Qualifications**
**What makes you remarkable?**
 At Wood, we are committed to equal opportunities and welcome all talented individuals to consider joining our team. So even if you don't match every statement below but feel you have some of the experience, knowledge or skills needed for this role, we encourage you to apply. It will take all of us working together to deliver solutions to the world’s most critical challenges.
   

  

**Experience**
* Minimum 12 years of experience in similar projects
* Degree qualified with relevent certification
* Experience in refinery and petrochemical projects preferred
* Proficient knowledge of Primavera and other scheduling software and related tools and techniques including Logic and CPM analysis, resource loading and levelling
* Proficient knowledge of Project Execution Procedures for Scheduling
* Proficient understanding of WBS \& CBS structures and project reporting capabilities
* Ability to develop project schedules and plans\\
* Ability to prepare resource loading, progress and staffing plans
* Proficient understanding of earned value application, cost and schedule variance analyses/trending and what\-if scenarios
* Detailed understanding of project management principles and techniques
* Good understanding of Cost Management, Change Control, Planning \& Risk Analysis \& Management


**About Us**
 Wood is a global leader in consulting and engineering, helping to unlock solutions to critical challenges in energy and materials markets. We provide consulting, projects and operations solutions in 45 countries, employing around 25,000 people. www.woodplc.com
   

  

**Diversity Statement**
 We are an equal opportunity employer that recognises the value of a diverse workforce. All suitably qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective criteria and without regard to the following (which is a non\-exhaustive list): race, colour, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status, or other characteristics in accordance with the relevant governing laws.

data.title: Vice President, Head of Information Technology, Oman
data.raw_snippet:
**JOB PURPOSE:** 



* Set the strategic agenda for IT in Oman in conjunction with EXCO and Group colleagues. Manage all information technology needs for the business from preparing the local IT strategy, evaluating systems, to overseeing implementation of the systems, to ensure cost effective IT de
data.jd_text:
**JOB PURPOSE:** 



* Set the strategic agenda for IT in Oman in conjunction with EXCO and Group colleagues. Manage all information technology needs for the business from preparing the local IT strategy, evaluating systems, to overseeing implementation of the systems, to ensure cost effective IT delivery. Identify, source, and implement local IT solutions that cannot be provided by Group as necessary.
* Develop technology roadmaps, strong governance over IT operations, vendor management, regulatory compliance, and business relationship management.
* Manage day\-to\-day operations of the Oman Branch IT to achieve timely, accurate, and uninterrupted delivery of IT services.
* Manage the stakeholders’ relationship and expectations “both locally within the country, within the OMAN region and within the group” effectively ; this includes local Business , Information security, compliance, Data privacy, group technology , etc
* This role assumes the position of the Head of IT\- Oman, and is responsible for the smooth and efficient functioning of the FAB Oman Branch's IT operations by ensuring the effective management of the processes, systems and people required to design, develop, deliver, and improve technology services across the business
* Oversee the day\-to\-day IT operations in accordance with IT policies and technology standards as FAB Group and local regulatory requirements.
* Act as a single point of contact for the various business areas in Oman Branch to enhance customer experience, manage customer expectations and achieve customer satisfaction.
* Lead the development and execution of the IT strategy for FAB Oman, ensuring alignment with Group objectives and regulatory requirements.
* Drive digital transformation, innovation, and operational excellence to deliver business value and competitive advantage.
* Serve as the principal advisor to executive leadership on all technology matters, with full accountability for IT risk, compliance, and business continuity.
* Champion a culture of high performance, agility, and continuous improvement across the IT function.



  





**KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES:** 





 IT Strategy
 



* Contribute to the development of technology strategies and roadmap in alignment with Head Office’s global strategy in tandem with the needs of the branch.
* Responsible to provide regular updates on Oman IT deliverables and progress of OMAN IT strategy and roadmap implementation .Propose or influence technology solution delivery based on business requirements, existing applications and latest technology trends.
* Monitor developments or advancements in technology, assess their value\-add potential and applicability for adoption by branch.
* Partner with business/IT leadership team to develop and deliver IT strategies, technology innovation \& solutions that drive business and service excellence.
* Act as an advisor to the business leadership team by providing solutions to support business needs, enhance branch efficiency and enrich customer experience.




 IT Operations
 



* Ensure all the IT hardware and applications in OMAN branches are running/functioning well within the agreed SLA.
* Monitor all IT issues and ensure timely closure of these issues.
* Conduct the IT assessments for all new or existing systems, where required and applicable
* Manage and report all serious IT incidents, including providing root cause analysis and remedial actions to be taken.
* Ensure all IT documentations are up to date
* Ensure all IT activities including changes to existing systems and implementation of new systems/ processes are in compliance with HO Policy and local regulations.
* Support and undertake all disaster recovery activities for primary and DR sites conduicted by Head Office and/or branch
* Proper maintenance of a comprehensive inventory listing for all IT assets
* Manage the OMAN IT vendors and responsible for the effective oversight of the technology service providers to FAB OMAN




 Leadership Management
 



* Accountable for and have direct oversight over a team of IT employees, including those from outsource service providers
* oversee resource allocation plan to ensure appropriate balance between tactical and strategic demands, staff development plan, staff appraisals and feedback.
* Identify and develop key talent and ensure proper succession/back\-up plan is in place
* Oversee OMAN branches annual budget.
* Manage and control the branch’s annual IT budget and expenditure by ensuring proper costs recording, classification of costs, timely accruals and produce variance reporting.
* Provide advice to Senior Management on all IT related laws, regulations and guidelines and their implications to the branch.
* Provide resolution to Senior Management on all IT\-related issues or problems.




 Information and Cyber Security
 



* Proactively address the external threat environment for emerging threats, data breaches, IT security breaches, and implement the appropriate courses of action, including timely patching for vulnerabilities
* Manage and contain information security incidents and events to protect corporate IT assets, intellectual property, regulated data and the branch’s reputation.




 IT Governance and Compliance
 



* Accountable for all aspects of IT Governance, Risk Management and Compliance by ensuring there is adequate business and systems controls in place for addressing business/regulatory data and IT compliance, for CBOregulations/notices. This is in addition to ensuring adequate procedures/processes are in place for continuous monitoring of both internal and outsourced/managed services vendor environments.
* Ensure compliance to IT polices, processes, Information security policy and local regulations
* Full ownership and accountability for IT audit, RCSA (Risk Profiles) and other 3rd assurance reviews and ensure risk remediation in timely manner




 Procurement and Project Management
 



* Accountable for procurement of all IT equipment upon consultation/direction from Head Office in Oman branch and ensure proper oversight on the technology procuremg in OMAN branches
* Ensure all OMAN local IT initiatives are negiotiation with terms favourable to the branch and/or timely renewed prior to expiry of contracts
* Ensure all change management activities are carried out orderly, including changes to existing systems and implementation of new systems / processes are in compliance with HO Policy and local regulations, testing have being conducted with results properly validated and documentation/training have been shared with staff
* Accountable for the overall successful delivery of projects by overseeing the delivery to ensure that IT solutions implemented fulfil branch’s needs.



  





**QUALIFICATIONS \& EXPERIENCE:** 



* Master’s or Bachelor’s in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology or related qualification
* Certification in Cloud , Project Management Professional (PMP), COBIT, CISSP and/or other relevant technical certifications will be an advantage
* At least 12 years of relevant work experience in banking Business and technology services , IT infrastructure and operations, inclusive of at least 5 years’ experience in leading and managing employees.
* Good track record in IT strategy development, solution design, programme and project delivery and service management.
* Strong working knowledge in enterprise applications, technical infrastructure, web and mobile technologies and IT security.
* Strong business process and analytical skills with the ability to assimilate information quickly and communicate complex requirements and issues clearly and concisely.
* Good grasp of IT technologies, methodologies, architectures, and best practices.
* Understanding and appreciation of new trends and shifts in technology, ability to evaluate these trends/shifts for IT infrastructure and operations and developing budgets/plans that align to long term business transformation.
* Excellent interpersonal, communication (both oral and written), influencing and negotiation skills
* Pro\-active, dynamic, dedicated and responsible self\-starter with strong customer orientation
* Confident and ability to work under pressure in a fast\-paced environment with multi\-tasking capabilities
* Strong knowledge and understanding of CBO regulations

data.title: Interface Stakeholder Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for an Interface \& Stakeholder Manager – Aviation Projects to join our team in KSA/ UAE. The Interface \& Stakeholder Manager will be responsible for managing all project interfaces across aviation ‑ sector stakeholders, including gove
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for an Interface \& Stakeholder Manager – Aviation Projects to join our team in KSA/ UAE. The Interface \& Stakeholder Manager will be responsible for managing all project interfaces across aviation ‑ sector stakeholders, including governmental authorities, airport operators, contractors, consultants, utility providers, and internal technical teams. The role ensures seamless coordination, clear communication, and the timely resolution of interface issues that may affect programme delivery. It also involves developing and implementing structured stakeholder engagement plans to maintain alignment, avoid conflicts, and support smooth project execution. The Manager will provide regular reporting to the Project Director, highlighting interface risks, dependencies, and mitigation strategies critical to the success of the aviation programme.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead and manage all interface activities across aviation stakeholders (government bodies, airport operators, contractors, consultants, utilities, and internal teams).
* Establish and maintain effective communication channels to ensure seamless coordination between all project parties.
* Identify, track, and resolve interface issues that could affect project progress, technical delivery, or schedule performance.
* Develop, implement, and maintain structured Stakeholder Engagement Plans to ensure alignment throughout all project phases.
* Facilitate interface workshops, coordination meetings, and technical discussions with project stakeholders.
* Liaise with regulatory authorities and airport operators to ensure compliance with aviation and infrastructure requirements.
* Prepare regular interface status reports and provide interface ‑ risk updates to the Project Director and leadership team.
* Maintain a comprehensive interface register, ensuring risks, dependencies, and actions are clearly documented and managed.
* Support integration between design, procurement, and construction teams, ensuring all disciplines are aligned.


 Promote a collaborative working environment across multidisciplinary teams
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Project Management, or a relevant field.
* 20\+ years of experience in interface management, stakeholder management, or project coordination within large ‑ scale aviation or major infrastructure projects.
* Experience working with airport authorities, regulatory bodies, or large PMC/consultancy organisations (highly preferred).
* Strong technical understanding of aviation infrastructure, design processes, construction interfaces, and multi ‑ party coordination.
* Proven track record resolving complex interface issues in fast ‑ paced project environments.


 Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.
   

  

 Join our close\-knit community of talented individuals who share your passion for making a positive impact. Our global team includes more than 69,000 employees, working together to make a difference in communities both close to home and around the world.
   

  

**With us, you can** 
**. Apply today.**

data.jd_text:
**Onboarding Support \- Upsells**
**Context of The Role**
 Reporting to the PMO, this position will manage the end \- to \- end onboarding process for prospects that want to onboard with Thunes, especially for upsells.The onboarding support will be the point\-of\-contact for the internal stakeholders and the future member. Responsibilities include supporting the member with the required steps and follow up internally to streamline the onboarding. This position requires a detailed\-oriented and proactive individual to streamline processes, manage documentation, and support the team in achieving business goals. You will collaborate closely with the sales, legal, compliance, finance and technical teams to ensure efficient operations and outstanding customer service.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Assist prospect and BD or AM in the go live for upsell opportunities
* Onboarding Support to follow up and enhance internal processes
* Close follow up on the onboarding process (compliance, legal \& technical integration) with internal \& external stakeholders
* Coordinate with various internal stakeholders to remove obstacles
* Identify inefficiencies in the sales/onboarding process and implement improvements
* Monitor and update the CRM, ensuring data accuracy for internal reporting
* Work closely with internal teams, such as Finance, Compliance, Treasury, Legal and Solution Delivery


**Professional Experience/ Qualifications**
 At Thunes to ensure we set out clear expectations for the business and you to succeed, it is
 **equally important** 
 for us in defining not only the nature of the role responsibilities but that the cultural fit in working style and approach is a match! So please read carefully below before putting yourself forward
   

  

* \~Bachelor’s Degree in a Business, Sales or related field
* Has work experience in commercial corporate environment\- ideally in Financial Services or a Tech Company
* High level of Microsoft Office Suite competency including at least intermediate Excel proficiency (Creating visual representations of data, creating \& managing pivot tables, ability to organize data using SUMIF, COUNTIF, and VLookup.)
* Salesforce/ Hubspot or other CRM proficiency
* Must be highly organised, independent and able to prioritise tasks
* Ability to work under pressure in a rapidly evolving fast\-paced environment
* Adept at developing and executing actions synthesized from analysis issues
* Detail\-oriented and a believer in value of process
* Must be flexible, self\-motivated and team\-oriented
* Highly adaptable, able to accept and create change
* Project management skills are desirable


**Key Skills \& Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Sales, Marketing, or related field.
* 1 to 2 years of experience in sales support, sales operations, or customer service in a B2B or fintech environment.
* Strong understanding of sales processes and CRM systems (Salesforce experience is a plus).
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills with a customer\-centric approach.
* Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
* Ability to work independently, manage time efficiently, and prioritize tasks in a fast\-paced environment.
* Detail\-oriented with strong analytical skills and problem\-solving capabilities.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).

data.jd_text:
**Description and Requirements**
**"At BMC trust is not just a word \- it's a way of life!"** 
**Description And Requirements**
**Hybrid**
**This Is Helix. Powered by You.**
 At
 **BMC Helix** 
 , we don’t do ordinary. We’re the
 **AI\-native engine** 
 behind the world’s most forward\-thinking IT organizations, helping them focus on what matters most. What are we passionate about? We're here to reset the economics of enterprise IT and help others realize the ROI of AI.
   

  

 We are a mix of
 **curious minds, creative thinkers, and courageous builders** 
 who believe tech should change the game—not just play it. We celebrate wins, support each other, and laugh a lot.
   

  

 We are the change makers. With decades of leadership and established trust in IT service and operations management, we’re scaling with purpose—through organic innovation, strategic acquisitions, and relentless R\&D. Our open\-first
 **Agentic AI platform** 
 empowers autonomous agents to drive real outcomes with speed, accountability, and precision.
   

  

 We are laser\-focused on delivering real value to our customers by accelerating innovation and the application of applying agentic AI in digital service and operations management for IT organizations around the world.
   

  

 The BMC Helix Project Architect performs a lead role in assessing and analysing capabilities, business and technical requirements, and Customer business drivers. The Architect develops, as necessary, solution architecture and program definitions. In addition, the Architect determines Customer environmental and personnel suitability, readiness to proceed, and provides best practice recommendations. The Architect provides engagement stability by leveraging extensive technical and leadership experiences.
   

  

 As a Subject Matter Expert, the Architect’s guidance may cover implementation approaches, strategy, integration, deployment, and adoption of best practices to ensure Customer success. The Architect role serves as a senior coach, mentor, and technical leader for members of the project team and Consultants.
   

  

**Key Accountabilities**
* Provides thought leadership and actionable guidance to during the sales process to setup a successful customer conversion and value realization roadmap
* Shares knowledge and experience with peers by contributing best practice templates and examples for the following delivery artifacts:
+ Conversion Methodology Presentation
+ Conversion Agendas
+ Conversion Analysis templates
+ Architectures Design Documents
+ Test Plans
+ Deployment Plan


**The Architect's Primary Responsibilities For The Role Are**
* Responsible for leading and/or participating in small teams comprised of BMC, partner and customer resources at client sites to deliver required outcomes and produce additional business with BMC Helix clients
* Create and maintain conversion projects artifacts
* Establish conditions of satisfaction and success factors with the Customer early in the sales cycle and ensure those are reviewed and maintained periodically through the sales lifecycle
* Development and maintenance of relationships with Conversion code programmers via weekly status calls
* Manage transition from Sales to Delivery Team
* Comprehensive review and clarification of SOW prior to deal closures
* Technical lead rescuing at risk or endangered projects in conjunction with Sales, Support \& R\&D
* Includes plan for communication and collaboration among the Customer Team, Account Team, Pre\-Sales, Services Sales, and the PMO
* Ensure all internal BMC Helix stakeholders are kept well informed on the engagement
* Improve the quality and efficiency of the solutions delivered to BMC Helix clients as a means to improve BMC Helix business margins
* Establish and lead conversion scoping meetings including preparation of materials and working with Customer, Sales team and other key stakeholders to review key conversion analysis information
* Precise project communications (to PMO and other internal stakeholders)
* Review of BMC Helix SOW scoping with the Customer
* Use your knowledge and skillset to create or improve processes and or code programs which assist with the deliverables associated with a competitive replacement sales opportunity or conversion project


**Success Behaviours**
* An individual contributor that:
+ Has the ability to work independently and provide quality output with minimal supervision/direction
+ Understand how to apply technology to improve the operational effectiveness or efficiency of specific IT functions or applications
+ Understand enterprise scale, integrated applications from a process/business perspective
+ Understands and can articulate how the BMC Helix solutions align to the Customer's needs
+ Receives positive Customer feedback from BMC Helix leadership, teams, peers, and sales groups
+ Cultivates satisfied, repeat Customers
+ Is seen by Customer's and peers as a trusted advisor, using best practices to make prescriptive recommendations that support the achievement of business goals

* Written and verbal communication skills at all levels of project team engagement and with the Customer C\-level executives \- advanced level
* Presentation skills to enable facilitation of workshops and meetings \- advanced level
* Communicates and orchestrates actions effectively for project success (e.g. proactively mitigates risks before issues impact the project)
* Leadership and mentoring / coaching skills \- advanced level
* Organization and planning skills \- advanced level
* Time Management \- advanced level
* Escalates appropriately for issues impacting sales opportunities, project delivery or Customer satisfaction, following process and policy
* Builds and maintains strong relationships with internal and external key stakeholders
* Continuously improves own skills and proactively seeks new learning and engagement opportunities
* Identifies new or emergent business opportunities with Customers and works with Account team for follow up
* Contributes to BMC knowledge through participation in internal initiatives
* Executes projects in compliance with the processes and standards of BMC Helix
* Excellence delivery methodology
* Fulfils all Ethics and Compliance training/testing requirements to protect BMC Helix interests and assets at all times


**Qualifications /Experience/Certifications**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent
* Fluent in Arabic and English
* 10(\+) years of technical IT experience that includes:
+ 7(\+) years BMC Remedy / Helix ITSM product line experience
+ 5(\+) years deploying enterprise management software solutions

* ITIL v3 Foundation
* Must be familiar with other IT management technologies and have a working knowledge of ITOM
* Non\-BMC Helix skills in technical areas which support the deployment and integration of BMC based solutions, including (intermediate to advanced level):
+ Advanced OS
+ DB
+ Storage
+ Virtual

* Additional experiences include:
+ Engagement leader
+ 3(\+) projects as technical lead
+ 3(\+) production solutions implemented
+ 3(\+) deployment(s) across Dev, UAT \& Prod for full project life\-cycle
+ Multiple 6(\+) month engagements or experience in a project for the entire project lifecycle
+ Technical lead rescuing at risk or endangered projects in conjunction with Sales, Support, R\&D


**Why Work Here? Because You’ll Matter.**
 We’re not hiring for roles—we’re hiring for
 **impact** 
 . At Helix, you’ll solve hard problems, build smart solutions, and work with people who challenge and champion you. You’ll see your ideas come to life—and your work make a difference.
   

  

 We believe in
 **trust, transparency, and grit** 
 . Our culture is inclusive, flexible, and built for people who want to stretch themselves \- and support others doing the same. Whether you’re remote or in\-office, you’ll find space to show up fully and contribute meaningfully. You won’t be boxed in—you’ll be backed up.
   

  

**Make Your Mark At Helix**
 If Helix excites you but you're unsure if you meet every qualification,
 **apply anyway** 
 . We value diverse perspectives and believe the best ideas come from everywhere.
   

  

**EEOC Statement**
 Helix is committed to equal opportunity employment regardless of race, age, sex, creed, color, religion, citizenship status, sexual orientation, gender, gender expression, gender identity, national origin, disability, marital status, pregnancy, disabled veteran or status asa protected veteran. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application and hiring process, visit the accommodation request page.
   

  

 BMC Software maintains a strict policy of not requesting any form of payment in exchange for employment opportunities, upholding a fair and ethical hiring process.
